i: ICF (Instituto de Conservación Forestal) — responsible for forest management and conservation. CONADEH — the national human rights commissioner. Note: Honduras is one of the most dangerous countries for ambiental defenders — Global Witness documents multiple killings annually.

Corporación Dinant — Honduras's largest palm oil producer (implicated in Aguán Valley land conflicts). Jaremar — another major palm oil company. IFC (International Finance Corporation) — has faced accountability complaints regarding investments in Honduran palm oil.
MiAmbiente+ (Secretaría de Recursos Naturales y Ambiente) — Honduras's environment ministry. SAG (Secretaría de Agricultura y Ganadería) — the agriculture ministry.

Congreso Nacional de Honduras — unicameral legislature with 128 members. Honduras is a presidential democracia. SICA (Sistema de la Integración Centroamericana) — the Central American integration system.

HR.s: EU and Eurozone member ($93B PIB) with dominant services sector (60.8% PIB, tourism-heavy). Small oil sector (INA, partially owned by MOL). Agricultura a 2.9% PIB. Joined the euro and Schengen in 2023.

sectors.w: Croatia's EU-integrated health insurance system (HZZO) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-attributable disease costs per product category makes W computable from retail sales data.
bp: Implementar EU front-of-pack health labelling. Makes welfare costs visible to consumers.
HZZO publication of diet-attributable healthcare cost data. Croatia's universal health insurance generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Reformarulation mandates reduce dependência do sistema.

i: HAH (Hrvatska agencija za hranu / Croatian Food Agency) — food safety authority. AZTN (Agencija za zaštitu tržišnog natjecanja) — competition authority. Croatia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.
Podravka, Kraš — major Croatian food companies. Agrokor/Fortenova Group — the largest food and retail conglomerate in Southeast Europe.
HZZO (Hrvatski zavod za zdravstveno osiguranje) — Croatia's health insurance fund. Ministry of Health oversees nutrition policy.
Hrvatski sabor (Croatian Parliament) — unicameral, 151 members. Contact through sabor.hr. Croatia is an EU and Eurozone member.

HT.s: Fragile state ($25.2B PIB) — Western Hemisphere's poorest country. Agricultura a 15.9% PIB (coffee, mangoes, cocoa). Extreme desmatamento (2% forest cover remaining). Gang violence and political instability. Manufatura a 26.2% PIB (garment assembly).

sectors.w: Haiti's near-total desmatamento (98% forest loss) means any remaining agriculture operates on severely degraded land. The dependência do sistema is already partially broken — Haiti has experienced the endpoint of desmatamento-driven agricultural collapse. Reforestation is the intervention.
bp: Reformar agricultural support to incentivize tree planting and agroforestry. Quando hillside farmers receive more support for tree crops (coffee, cocoa, fruit) than annual crops on degraded slopes, o interesse sobreposto em continued desmatamento breaks.
Satellite monitoring of remaining forest cover and soil erosion published at commune level. Making degradation visible makes W computable.

Extreme dependência do sistema — 98% forest loss means agricultural activity on degraded slopes directly causes erosion, flooding, and further land degradation. Reforestation is the only path to reducing dependência do sistema.

i: MDE (Ministère de l'Environnement) — the environment ministry, severely under-resourced. Note: Haiti's state institutions are largely non-functional due to the ongoing security and governance crisis. International organizations (UN, USAID, EU) provide most ambiental programming.
Haiti's private sector is small. The Chambre de Commerce d'Haïti coordinates business activities. International NGOs (Partners in Health, Trees for the Future) implement many development programs.

MARNDR (Ministère de l'Agriculture, des Ressources Naturelles et du Développement Rural) — the agriculture ministry. ONEV (Observatoire National de l'Environnement et de la Vulnérabilité) — ambiental monitoring.

Note: Haiti's democratic institutions are non-functional — no elected parliament since 2023, no elected president. Transitional governance is underway. International channels: UN Integrated Office in Haiti (BINUH), CARICOM, OAS, Haitian diaspora organizations.

HU.s: membro da UE ($222.7B PIB) with strong manufacturing (15.8% PIB, automotive-focused). Serviços a 59.5% PIB. Small oil and gas sector (MOL Group). Agricultura a 2.7% PIB. Democratic backsliding under Orbán government has strained EU relations.

sectors.w: Hungary has one of Europe's highest obesity rates and introduced a 'chip tax' (NETA — népegészségügyi termékadó) on UPF in 2011. Quando health insurance data (NEAK) links diet to healthcare costs per product category, W se torna computável.
bp: Fortalecer the NETA tax and extend to broader UPF categories. Hungary's pioneering public health product tax enfraquece o interesse sobreposto em high-margin UPF by internalizing health costs.
NEAK publication of diet-attributable healthcare expenditure. Hungary's health insurance system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Reformarulation targets can reduce dependência do sistema.

i: NÉBIH (Nemzeti Élelmiszerlánc-biztonsági Hivatal) — Hungary's food chain safety authority. GVH (Gazdasági Versenyhivatal) — competition authority enforcing fair advertising. Hungary transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive.
Major companies: Bonafarm Group, Pick Szeged. International companies operating in Hungary: Nestlé, Coca-Cola, PepsiCo.

NETA (népegészségügyi termékadó) — Hungary's public health product tax, one of the world's first UPF taxes, introduced 2011. NEAK (Nemzeti Egészségbiztosítási Alapkezelő) — national health insurance fund.
Országgyűlés (National Assembly of Hungary) — unicameral parliament, 199 members. Contact through parlament.hu.

ID.s: G20 economia ($1,396.3B PIB). World's largest palm oil producer (palm oil=~3.5% PIB). Significant coal (1.22% rents), oil/gas (1.61%), and mineração (1.91%). Massive archipelago with extraordinary biodiversity. Palm oil expansion has driven catastrophic desmatamento.

sectors.w: Indonesia produces ~60% of global palm oil. EUDR compliance will require zero-desmatamento traceability to plantation level. Quando por usinaation forest loss data is linked to palm oil transactions, W se torna computável from commodity prices.
bp: EUDR compliance forcing zero-desmatamento supply chain traceability. Quando international buyers require verified desmatamento-free palm oil, o interesse sobreposto em clearing forest for new plantations breaks — productivity improvement on existing land becomes the viable model.

Mandatory per-concession ambiental data (fire occurrence, peat depth, biodiversity surveys) linked to ISPO certification. Indonesia's KLHK already monitors desmatamento by satellite — publishing per-company data makes W computable.

Parcialmente quebrável. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, smallholder agroforestry and yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce pressure for new forest conversion.

i: KLHK (Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup dan Kehutanan) — the environment and forestry ministry, responsible for forest management, ambiental regulation, and fire prevention. Komnas HAM (Komisi Nasional Hak Asasi Manusia) — the national human rights commission. WALHI (Wahana Lingkungan Hidup Indonesia / Friends of the Earth Indonesia) — the largest ambiental NGO.

Wilmar International — the world's largest palm oil trader. Golden Agri-Resources (Sinar Mas Group) — one of the largest palm oil producers. GAPKI (Gabungan Pengusaha Kelapa Sawit Indonesia) — the Indonesian palm oil association. RSPO and ISPO (Indonesian Sustainable Óleo de Palma) — certification standards.

One Map Policy (Kebijakan Satu Peta) — Indonesia's initiative to create a single, authoritative map of land use and forest cover to resolve overlapping concessions. BPDPKS (Badan Pengelola Dana Perkebunan Kelapa Sawit) — the palm oil plantation fund managing the CPO export levy.

DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat / People's Representative Council) — lower house, 580 members. DPD (Dewan Perwakilan Daerah / Regional Representative Council) — upper house, 136 members. Contact through dpr.go.id. Indonesia is a presidential democracia and the world's third-largest democracia.

IE.s: High-income EU economia ($609.2B PIB, inflated by multinational profit booking). Manufatura a 29.6% PIB (pharma, tech). Major corporate tax hub. Agricultura a 1% PIB but intensive dairy farming with significant methane emissões. Serviços a 60.6% PIB.

sectors.w: Ireland's dairy herd expansion post-milk-quota-abolition (2015) increased methane emissões by 20%+. Quando per-farm greenhouse gas data is published alongside output, W se torna computável from agricultural production data.
bp: Reformar CAP subsidies from production-linked to ambiental outcome-linked. Quando dairy expansion no longer receives per-cow support, o interesse sobreposto em herd growth enfraquece.
Mandatory per-farm greenhouse gas balance disclosure. Ireland's Bord Bia Origin Green program collects data — making it publicly verifiable makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Ruminant digestion produces methane by biological process. Feed additives (e.g., 3-NOP) can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane.

i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency) — Ireland's ambiental regulator. Protected Disclosures Act 2014 (amended 2022) — Ireland's denunciante protection law, one of the strongest in Europe.

Kerry Group — major food ingredients company. Glanbia — dairy and nutrition company. Ornua (formerly Irish Dairy Board) — manages Kerrygold brand. Teagasc — the agriculture and food development authority providing research and extension.
DAFM (Department of Agriculture, Food and the Marine) — Ireland's agriculture ministry. Bord Bia (Irish Food Board) — the food marketing agency running the Origin Green sustainability program.

Oireachtas (Parliament of Ireland) — bicameral: Dáil Éireann (160 TDs) and Seanad Éireann (60 Senators). Contact through oireachtas.ie. Ireland's Climate Action and Low Carbon Desenvolverment Act (2021) sets legally binding emissões budgets.

IL.s: High-tech economia ($540.4B PIB) with dominant services (72.5% PIB). High military expenditure (8.78% PIB). Gas production from Leviathan and Tamar fields (0.43% gas rents). Major tech sector — 'Startup Nation.' Water management leader (desalination, drip irrigation).

sectors.w: Israel's Mediterranean gas fields (Leviathan, Tamar) were discovered in 2009-2010. Per-field emissões disclosure through ISA (Israel Securities Authority) listed company requirements makes W computable from production data.
bp: Export gas to replace coal in Egypt and Jordan — net emissões benefit if displacing higher-carbon sources. But this locks in gas infrastructure. Quando renewable alternatives become cheaper for regional electricity, the interesse sobreposto enfraquece.
Mandatory por campo emissões disclosure for Leviathan and Tamar operators. ISA reporting requirements provide the mechanism to make W computable.
Não é possível quebrar by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.

Advocate for Abraham Accords normalization to include energia renovável cooperation with Gulf states

i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — Israel's autoridade ambiental. ISA (Israel Securities Authority) — regulates disclosure for listed companies including Delek Group. Israel has denunciante protections under the Protection of Workers (Exposure of Offenses) Law, 1997.
NewMed Energy — operates Leviathan field. Chevron — acquired Noble Energy's interest in Tamar. Israel Natural Gas Lines (INGL) — the estatal gas transmission company.

Petroleum Commissioner — within the Ministry of Energy, oversees oil and gas licensing. Electricity Authority — the independent electricity regulator. Israel's Electricity Market Reformar aims to increase competition and renewable penetration.

Knesset (כנסת) — Israel's unicameral parliament, 120 members. Contact through knesset.gov.il. Israel is an OECD member. EMGF (Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum) — regional organization for gas market coordination.

IQ.s: Oil-dependent economia ($279.6B PIB) with 43.45% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. OPEC member producing ~4.5M bpd. Massive gas flaring (Iraq flares more gas than almost any other country). Post-conflict reconstruction ongoing.

sectors.w: Iraq flares $2.5B+ worth of associated gas annually. Capturing and monetizing flared gas makes W computable — the flared gas represents pure waste visible from satellite (World Bank GGFR data).
bp: Gas capture and monetization. Iraq wastes $2.5B/year in flared gas. Quando gas capture infrastructure is built, o interesse sobreposto em flaring (which is cheaper short-term than processing) breaks as captured gas generates revenue.
Satellite-based flare monitoring (VIIRS nightfire data) already makes gas flaring volumes visible globally. Linking por campo flaring data to production revenue makes W computable.
Não é possível quebrar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: Note: Iraq's institutional capacity for ambiental regulation is limited. The Ministry of Oil oversees petroleum operations. EITI Iraq — Iraq has been EITI compliant since 2012. World Bank Global Gas Flaring Reduction Partnership (GGFR) — monitors and reports on global gas flaring using satellite data.

BP operates Rumaila (Iraq's largest field). TotalEnergies has the $27B Gas Growth Integrated Project (GGIP) to capture associated gas. ExxonMobil, Lukoil, PetroChina — other major operators. Basra Oil Company — manages southern oil fields.

Ministry of Oil — oversees all petroleum operations and manages Technical Service Contracts (TSCs) with international operators. Ministry of Environment — responsible for ambiental policy but severely under-resourced.

Note: Iraq is a parlamentar democracia but governance is fragmented among sectarian and ethnic power blocs. Council of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 329 members). International channels: OPEC membership, World Bank, UNAMI (UN Assistance Mission for Iraq), GGFR.

IR.s: Major oil and gas producer ($475.3B PIB) with 27.08% combined rents. World's second-largest natural gas reserves (after Russia). Under comprehensive international sanções. Manufatura a 20.6% PIB. Theocratic governance limits civic channels.

sectors.w: International sanções have already weakened the interesse sobreposto by restricting Iran's ability to monetize oil exports at market price. Quando sanções enforcement eliminates the discount market, Iran's economic model requires diversification.
bp: Sanctions enforcement. Quando Iran cannot sell oil at market prices, the economic case for energia renovável investment (Iran has excellent solar potential) strengthens. The interesse sobreposto in oil dependence breaks when export revenues are structurally constrained.
Per-field ambiental data is largely unavailable due to sanções-related opacity. International satellite monitoring (methane detection) provides external data to estimate W.
Não é possível quebrar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: DoE (سازمان حفاظت محیط زیست / Department of Environment) — Iran's autoridade ambiental, which has limited enforcement power. NIOC (National Iranian Oil Company) — the state oil company. Note: Iran has no effective denunciante protection. Civil society is severely constrained.

NIOC — controls all upstream oil and gas operations. NIGC (National Iranian Gas Company) — manages gas production and distribution. Pars Oil and Gas Company — manages South Pars/North Dome gas field operations.

Ministry of Petroleum — oversees oil and gas policy. Iran's Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency Organization (SATBA) — responsible for energia renovável development. Iran has installed some solar and wind capacity but it remains a tiny fraction of energy supply.

Note: Iran is a theocratic republic. The Islamic Consultative Assembly (Majles, 290 members) has limited power relative to the Supreme Leader and Guardian Council. International channels: OPEC, UNFCCC (Iran signed but did not ratify Paris Agreement), UN Environment Programme.

IS.s: Small advanced economia ($33.3B PIB) with 100% renewable electricity (geothermal and hydro). Pesca are 5% of PIB and the largest PST exposure — Iceland's fisheries management is globally studied but faces sustainability challenges from ocean warming.

sectors.w: Iceland's ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system generates detailed per-vessel catch data. Quando ecosystem health metrics (stock assessments, bycatch, seabed impact) are published alongside fishing revenue, W se torna computável.
bp: Reformar ITQ allocations to include ecosystem impact costs. Quando quota holders pay for bycatch and seabed damage, o interesse sobreposto em maximum extraction enfraquece.
Publish per-vessel ecosystem impact data alongside catch revenue. Iceland's Marine and Freshwater Research Institute already conducts stock assessments — linking to economic data makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Fishing inherently removes biomass from marine ecosystems. However, science-based quota management can keep extraction within sustainable yield limits.

i: Fiskistofa (Directorate of Pesca) — responsible for fisheries management, quota enforcement, and monitoring. Hafrannsóknastofnun (Marine and Freshwater Research Institute) — conducts stock assessments and marine research.

Samherji — Iceland's largest fishing company. Brim, HB Grandi — other major fishing companies. SFS (Samtök fyrirtækja í sjávarútvegi / Federation of Icelandic Fishing Vessel Owners) — the industry association.

Ministry of Food, Agriculture and Pesca — oversees fisheries policy. The ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system — Iceland's fisheries management system, one of the world's most studied, allocating catch shares that can be traded.

Alþingi (Althing) — Iceland's unicameral parliament, 63 members, one of the world's oldest legislatures (established 930 CE). Contact through althingi.is. NEAFC — the regional fisheries management organization for the Northeast Atlantic.

JG.s: British Crown Dependencies ($12.5B PIB) — Jersey and Guernsey. Major offshore financial centers (91.2% services). Financial services dominate with significant fund administration and trust structures. Not part of the UK or EU but closely aligned with UK regulatory standards.

sectors.w: Channel Islands' financial services facilitate global capital flows with lower transparência than UK mainland. Quando beneficial ownership data and tax transparência information are published, W se torna computável from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full beneficial ownership transparência aligned with UK Economic Crime Act requirements. Quando financial secrecy is eliminated, the interesse sobreposto between service providers and opacity-seeking clients enfraquece.
Mandatory CRS (Common Reporting Standard) enhanced reporting. Publishing aggregate capital flow data makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Financial intermediation can relocate but the Channel Islands' proximity to London and established legal infrastructure create switching costs.
a: Report suspicious transactions to JFIU (Joint Financial Intelligence Unit) in Jersey or FIS (Financial Intelligence Service) in Guernsey
Document regulatory violations — report to JFSC or GFSC

i: JFSC (Jersey Serviços Financeiros Commission) — Jersey's financial regulator. GFSC (Guernsey Serviços Financeiros Commission) — Guernsey's financial regulator. JFIU / FIS — financial intelligence units.
Channel Islands host operations of major international banks and fund administrators. Jersey Finance and Guernsey Finance promote the financial services sectors.
JFSC — Jersey's integrated financial regulator. GFSC — Guernsey's equivalent. Both crown dependencies have their own regulatory frameworks but coordinate closely with UK authorities.

States of Jersey (49 members) and States of Guernsey (38 members) — the insular legislatures. Constitutional relationship with UK means UK Parliament can legislate for the Crown Dependencies on international obligations.

JM.s: Caribbean island economia ($22B PIB) with tourism and services dominant (60% PIB). Agricultura a 8% PIB. Bauxite/alumina industry historically significant but declining. Climate-vulnerable. High debt burden (IMF structural adjustment).

sectors.w: Jamaica's agricultural sector is dominated by sugar and banana monoculture on degraded soils. Quando soil health and watershed degradation data is published alongside agricultural output, W se torna computável.
bp: Reformar agricultural subsidies toward crop diversification and agroforestry. Quando farmers receive support for diverse crops rather than monoculture sugar, the interesse sobreposto breaks.
Publish watershed health and soil erosion data linked to agricultural practices. NEPA collects ambiental data — linking to farming output makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Tropical monoculture inherently degrades soil. Jamaica's Blue Mountain coffee model shows premium diversification is viable.
a: Report ambiental violations to NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency)
Document agricultural chemical misuse — report to RADA (Rural Agricultural Desenvolverment Authority)

i: NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency) — Jamaica's autoridade ambiental. RADA — provides agricultural extension services.
Sugar Industry Authority — regulates Jamaica's sugar sector. Jamaica Producers Group — diversified agricultural company.
Ministry of Agriculture and Pesca — oversees agricultural policy. SIA — regulates the sugar industry.
Parliament of Jamaica — bicameral: House of Representatives (63 members) and Senate (21 appointed). Jamaica is a Westminster-style parlamentar democracia.

JO.s: Water-scarce Middle Eastern economia ($53.4B PIB) with limited natural resources. Serviços a 60.4% PIB. High military expenditure (4.8% PIB). Manufatura a 17.7% (phosphate, potash, pharmaceuticals). Among the world's most water-stressed countries.

sectors.w: Jordan's phosphate and potash mineração (Arab Potash Company, Jordan Phosphate Mines Company) depletes Dead Sea water levels and contaminates groundwater. Quando ambiental cost data is published alongside mineração revenue, W se torna computável.
bp: Internalize ambiental costs (Dead Sea decline, water depletion) into mineração operations through ambiental levies. Quando miners pay for water extraction in one of Earth's most water-stressed countries, o interesse sobreposto em water-intensive extraction enfraquece.
Publish por mina water consumption and Dead Sea level impact data. Jordan's water authority collects data — linking to mineração output makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Mining inherently uses water. However, water recycling and dry processing can reduce per-ton water consumption.

i: Ministry of Environment — Jordan's autoridade ambiental. WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan) — manages the country's severely limited water resources. Jordan has approximately 60 cubic meters of renewable water per capita — far below the 500 m³ threshold for absolute water scarcity.
JPMC — one of the world's largest phosphate producers. APC (Arab Potash Company) — extracts potash from the Dead Sea.
Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources — oversees mineração policy. NRA (Natural Resources Authority) — the mineração regulatory body.

Majlis al-Umma (Parliament of Jordan) — bicameral: Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives, 130 members, elected) and Majlis al-Ayan (Senate, 65 appointed). Jordan is a monarquia constitucional with limited democratic space.

KE.s: East Africa's largest economia ($120.3B PIB) with agriculture at 22.5% PIB (tea, coffee, horticulture). Serviços a 55.3%. 90%+ renewable electricity (geothermal, hydro). Vibrant tech sector (M-Pesa). Wildlife tourism. Climate-vulnerable (drought cycles).

sectors.w: Kenya's tea and horticulture sectors use intensive farming on shrinking arable land. Quando per-farm water and pesticide data is published alongside export revenue, W se torna computável. Kenya's M-Pesa infrastructure enables farm-level data collection.
bp: Reformar agricultural export incentives to require ambiental certification. Quando tea and flower exports must demonstrate sustainable water and pesticide use, o interesse sobreposto em intensive monoculture enfraquece.
Farm-level ambiental data collection using mobile technology (Kenya's digital infrastructure is advanced). Making water and chemical use visible per farm makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Intensive horticulture inherently affects water and soil systems. However, Kenya's organic agriculture sector is growing and agroforestry can reduce dependência do sistema.

i: NEMA (National Environment Management Authority) — Kenya's ambiental regulator, responsible for ambiental impact assessments, pollution control, and enforcement. WRA (Water Resources Authority) — manages water resources allocation and monitoring. PCPB (Pest Control Products Board) — regulates pesticide registration and use.

KTDA — manages tea production for ~600,000 smallholder farmers. KFC (Kenya Flower Council) — the self-regulatory body for the cut flower industry. Unilever (Lipton/Ekaterra) — major buyer of Kenyan tea.
Ministry of Agriculture, Livestock, Pesca and Cooperatives — oversees agricultural policy. AFA — regulates agricultural commodities including tea, coffee, and horticultural products.

Parliament of Kenya — bicameral: National Assembly (349 members) and Senate (67 members). Contact through parliament.go.ke. Kenya's 2010 Constitution includes strong ambiental protection provisions (Article 42 — right to a clean and healthy environment).

KG.s: Small mountainous economia ($17.5B PIB) dominated by gold mineração (Kumtor mine = 10%+ of PIB, min=11.15%). Agricultura a 8.6% PIB. Remittances from Russia significant. Parliamentary democracia (rare in Central Asia).

sectors.w: Kumtor gold mine (Centerra Gold, now nationalized) operates near glaciers — tailings and cyanide contamination affect water systems. Quando ambiental monitoring data is published, W se torna computável.
bp: Environmental bonds and community benefit agreements for all mineração. Quando remediation costs are internalized, marginal mines become unprofitable.
Per-mine water quality and glacier impact monitoring published openly. Making ambiental costs visible makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Mining at high altitude inherently affects glacial systems. Improved tailings management can reduce impact.

i: SAEPF — ambiental agency. Kyrgyzaltyn — state gold company that took over Kumtor in 2022.
Kyrgyzaltyn — manages state mineração interests. EITI Kyrgyz Republic — member since 2004.
State Committee for Industry, Energy and Subsoil Use — mineração regulator.
Jogorku Kenesh (Supreme Council) — unicameral parliament, 90 members. Kyrgyzstan is Central Asia's most democratic country.

KH.s: Lower-middle-income economia ($46.4B PIB) with garment manufacturing (27.8% PIB) and agriculture (16.6%). Mekong Delta desmatamento ongoing. Authoritarian governance under Hun Manet (succeeded Hun Sen in 2023).

sectors.w: Cambodia lost 25%+ of tree cover since 2000 — economic land concessions for rubber and sugar monoculture are primary drivers. Satellite monitoring makes desmatamento computable.
bp: Reformar economic land concession system to require ambiental compliance. Quando concession holders face revocation for desmatamento, the interesse sobreposto enfraquece.
Satellite-based forest monitoring (Global Forest Watch already tracks Cambodia extensively) linked to concession data makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. Community-managed forests demonstrate alternative models.

i: Note: Cambodia under CPP governance severely restricts sociedade civil. LICADHO (Cambodian League for the Promotion and Defence of Human Rights) — one of the few remaining domestic human rights organizations. Global Witness has documented illegal logging and land concession abuses.

Major economic land concessions are held by politically connected companies and foreign investors (Chinese, Vietnamese, Thai companies). The garment sector (H&M, Gap supply chains) has ambiental certification requirements.

Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Pesca — oversees agricultural and forestry policy. Ministry of Environment — manages protected areas. Sub-Decree 146 on Economic Land Concessions governs the ELC system.

Note: Cambodia's National Assembly (125 members) is dominated by the CPP. The Senate (62 members) is similarly controlled. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, EU EBA trade preferences (EU has partially withdrawn preferences citing human rights concerns).

KW.s: Wealthy petrostate ($160.2B PIB) with 29.28% combined oil and gas rents. Kuwait Petroleum Corporation (KPC) manages all oil operations. Kuwait Investment Authority (KIA) is one of the world's oldest sovereign wealth funds. Constitutional monarchy with elected parliament.

sectors.w: Kuwait's Burgan oil field (world's second-largest) is mature. As production costs rise, the interesse sobreposto enfraquece. KIA sovereign wealth provides a diversification mechanism.
bp: KIA investment diversification away from fossil fuels. Quando the sovereign wealth fund's returns from non-oil investments exceed declining oil returns, o interesse sobreposto em oil dependence breaks.
Per-field emissões disclosure for KPC operations. Making ambiental costs visible makes W computable.
Não é possível quebrar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: EPA Kuwait (Environment Public Authority) — the ambiental regulator. KPC (Kuwait Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil company managing all upstream and downstream operations. State Audit Bureau — conducts financial oversight.
KPC — manages Kuwait's entire petroleum value chain. KIA (Kuwait Investment Authority) — sovereign wealth fund, one of the world's largest.
Supreme Petroleum Council — the supreme decision-making body for oil policy. CBK (Central Bank of Kuwait) — the financial regulator.

Majlis al-Umma (National Assembly) — 50 elected members, one of the most active parliaments in the Gulf. Kuwait is a monarquia constitucional with genuine (if limited) parlamentar debate on oil policy.

KZ.s: Central Asia's largest economia ($291.5B PIB) with massive oil (14.84%) and gas (2.04%) rents. Tengiz, Kashagan, and Karachaganak are mega-fields. Mining at 9.1% (uranium — world's largest producer, copper, gold). Coal at 0.85%. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Kazakhstan's Kashagan field has suffered repeated delays and ambiental incidents (H₂S — hydrogen sulfide). Environmental monitoring of H₂S emissões and Caspian Sea impact makes W computable from production data.
bp: Redirect National Fund (sovereign wealth) investment toward economic diversification. Quando non-oil sectors grow faster than depleting oil revenue, o interesse sobreposto em continued extraction breaks.
Per-field emissões and ambiental monitoring disclosure (particularly H₂S at Kashagan). Making ambiental and health costs visible makes W computable.
Não é possível quebrar. Hydrocarbon extraction and combustion release CO₂ and H₂S.

i: Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources — autoridade ambiental. KazMunayGas — the national oil company. EITI Kazakhstan — member since 2007. Note: Civil society space is severely constrained.

NCOC (North Caspian Operating Company) — manages Kashagan (Shell, TotalEnergies, Eni, ExxonMobil, KMG, CNPC, Inpex). TCO (Tengizchevroil) — manages Tengiz (Chevron 50%, ExxonMobil 25%, KMG 20%, Lukoil 5%).

Ministry of Energy — oversees oil, gas, and energy policy. Samruk-Kazyna — the national wealth fund holding state shares in KazMunayGas and other state enterprises. National Fund of the Republic of Kazakhstan — the sovereign wealth fund (managed by the National Bank) with $55B+ in assets.

Note: Kazakhstan under President Tokayev is rated 'Not Free.' The Mazhilis (lower house, 107 members) and Senate (50 members) do not function independently. International channels: EITI, Tehran Convention (Caspian ambiental cooperation), SCO (Shanghai Cooperation Organisation), OSCE.

LA.s: Landlocked Southeast Asian economia ($16.5B PIB) with agriculture at 16.8% PIB and mineração at 3.89%. Major hydropower producer (dam exports to Thailand). One-party state. Severe debt crisis ($13B+ external debt, primarily to China).

sectors.w: Laos's mineração sector (gold, copper, potash) generates water contamination and community displacement. Quando ambiental monitoring data is published alongside mineração revenue, W se torna computável.
bp: Environmental bonds for mineração licenses. Quando remediation costs are pre-funded, marginal operations become uneconomic.
Per-mine ambiental data disclosure through international operator reporting. Making ambiental costs visible makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Mining disturbs landscapes but improved management can reduce impact.

Major operators include MMG (China Minmetals subsidiary), PanAust. Lao government holds equity in major mines.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — oversees mineração and energy policy. Laos is not yet an EITI member.
Note: National Assembly (164 members) is controlled by LPRP. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, Asian Desenvolverment Bank, World Bank.

LB.s: Collapsed economia ($20.1B PIB, down from $55B in 2018). Banking sector crisis wiped out savings. Services historically dominated. Political system based on sectarian power-sharing (confessionalism). Multiple concurrent crises — economic, political, refugee.

sectors.w: Lebanon's banking sector collapse (2019-present) represents a PST endgame — the interesse sobreposto has already partially broken through crisis. The remaining PST is in the lack of accountability for banking sector losses.
bp: Banking sector restructuring with full forensic audit of capital outflows. Quando accountability is established for the $72B+ in depositor losses, the interesse sobreposto between banks, politicians, and central bank in opacity breaks.
Publication of forensic audit results (Alvarez & Marsal was contracted but access was blocked). Making the flow of funds visible makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável — the crisis has already revealed dependência do sistema. But without institutional reform, the same dynamics can rebuild.

i: SIC (Special Investigation Commission) — Lebanon's financial intelligence unit. BDL (Banque du Liban / Central Bank) — the central bank whose financial engineering scheme is at the center of the crisis. Note: Lebanon has some of the region's strongest press freedom.
ABL (Association of Banks in Lebanon) — represents 60+ banks. BDL — the central bank. Lebanon's banking sector losses are estimated at $72B+.
Banking Control Commission — the banking supervisor. IMF — Lebanon reached a staff-level agreement in 2022 but reforms remain unimplemented.

Note: Lebanon's parliament (128 members, elected on confessional basis) is functional but deeply divided. The political system is paralyzed by sectarian power-sharing. International channels: IMF, World Bank, CEDRE conference donors, French-led international support group.

LK.s: Island economia ($99B PIB) recovering from 2022 economic crisis. Agricultura a 8.3% PIB (tea, rubber, coconut). Manufatura a 17.6% (garments). Tourism significant. Post-crisis IMF program. Historically one of Asia's highest human development indicators.

sectors.w: Sri Lanka's 2021 overnight organic farming mandate (banning chemical fertilizers) demonstrated how agricultural dependência do sistema works — it caused immediate crop failure. The lesson: gradual transition with data makes W computable.
bp: Gradual agricultural transition with per-farm soil health monitoring (learning from the 2021 failure). Quando transition is evidence-based rather than ideological, o interesse sobreposto em chemical-dependent monoculture enfraquece sustainably.
Per-estate ambiental data for tea, rubber, and coconut published alongside export revenue. Sri Lanka's Tea Research Institute collects data — making it public makes W computable.

Parcialmente quebrável. Sri Lanka's 2021 experiment showed both the reality of dependência do sistema (sudden decoupling fails) and its reducibility (gradual transition with soil biology rebuilding works).

Major plantation companies: Kelani Valley Plantations, Bogawantalawa Tea Estates. Sri Lanka Tea Board — regulates the tea industry.
Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy. Sri Lanka Tea Board — manages quality standards and exports.

Parliament of Sri Lanka (225 members). Contact through parliament.lk. Sri Lanka is a semi-presidential republic. EU GSP+ — Sri Lanka benefits from preferential trade access contingent on human rights and ambiental governance.

LT.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($84.9B PIB). Serviços a 63.6% PIB. Manufatura a 14% PIB. Achieved energy independence from Russian gas (Klaipėda LNG terminal). Agricultura a 2.6% PIB.

LU.s: Major EU financial center ($93.3B PIB, highest PIB per capita globally). Serviços a 81.2% PIB. World's second-largest investment fund domicile (after US). EU institutions host. Steel industry legacy (ArcelorMittal).

sectors.w: Luxembourg's investment fund industry manages €5T+ in assets. Quando financed emissões and beneficial ownership are disclosed, W se torna computável from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full EU SFDR and AMLD implementation. Quando fund-level financed emissões and beneficial ownership are transparent, o interesse sobreposto em opaque financial intermediation enfraquece.
CSSF mandatory ESG disclosure for all Luxembourg-domiciled funds. Making climate impact visible per fund makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Fund domiciliation can relocate, but Luxembourg's legal infrastructure and EU access create switching costs.

i: CSSF — Luxembourg's financial regulator, supervising banks, investment funds, and other financial entities. CRF (Cellule de Renseignement Financier) — financial intelligence unit.
Luxembourg hosts 3,600+ investment funds. ALFI (Association of the Luxembourg Fund Industry) — the industry association.
CSSF — conducts supervision of the fund industry. BCL (Banque centrale du Luxembourg) — participates in ECB monetary policy and macroprudential supervision.
Chambre des Députés — unicameral parliament, 60 members. Contact through chd.lu. Luxembourg was instrumental in establishing the EU Green Bond Standard and hosts the Luxembourg Green Exchange.

LV.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($43.7B PIB). Serviços a 64.6% PIB. Forestry significant. Agricultura a 4% PIB. Post-Soviet economic transformation. NATO member.

LY.s: Oil-dependent fragile state ($48.5B PIB) with 60.96% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. NOC (National Oil Corporation) manages production (~1.2M bpd when not disrupted). Divided governance (Tripoli vs. eastern-based authorities). Ongoing instability since 2011.

sectors.w: Libya's oil production is repeatedly disrupted by factional conflict (fields and export terminals seized as bargaining chips). The interesse sobreposto is already partially broken by instability — production is not reliably monetizable.
bp: Governance reform that depoliticizes oil revenue distribution. Quando oil revenue is managed through transparent, rules-based mechanisms (rather than factional control), o interesse sobreposto em capturing oil infrastructure enfraquece.
NOC por campo production and revenue data disclosure. The Libyan Audit Bureau provides some oversight — extending to ambiental data makes W computable.
Não é possível quebrar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: NOC (National Oil Corporation) — manages Libya's oil sector. Libyan Audit Bureau — provides financial oversight. UN Panel of Experts on Libya — monitors sanções compliance and resource governance.
NOC — the national oil company operating most production. Eni, TotalEnergies, Repsol, ConocoPhillips — major international operators.
CBL (Central Bank of Libya) — manages oil revenue. The division of the CBL between Tripoli and eastern-based institutions has complicated revenue management.

Note: Libya has no functioning unified government or elected legislature. The House of Representatives (Tobruk) and High Council of State (Tripoli) are rival bodies. International channels: UN Support Mission in Libya (UNSMIL), African Union, Arab League.

MA.s: North African economia ($160.6B PIB) with agriculture at 10.6% PIB and growing energia renovável sector (Noor-Ouarzazate solar complex). Major phosphate producer (OCP Group — world's largest). Manufatura a 15.3% PIB.

sectors.w: Morocco controls 70%+ of global phosphate reserves (OCP Group). Phosphate mineração generates cadmium-contaminated waste and depletes water in arid regions. Quando por mina ambiental data is published alongside production revenue, W se torna computável.
bp: Internalize water and cadmium remediation costs into phosphate pricing. Quando OCP pays for water depletion in already water-stressed regions, o interesse sobreposto em low-cost extraction enfraquece.

Mandatory por mina ambiental disclosure (water use, cadmium levels, waste volumes). OCP already publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verifiable por mina data makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Phosphate rock inherently contains cadmium. However, cadmium removal technologies exist and can reduce dependência do sistema.

i: Secrétariat d'État chargé du Développement Durable — oversees ambiental policy. ABH — river basin agencies managing water resources. OCP Group — the estatal phosphate company, one of Morocco's largest employers.

OCP Group (Office Chérifien des Phosphates) — estatal, controls ~30% of global phosphate trade. OCP has invested heavily in sustainability initiatives including the Mohammed VI Polytechnic University.
Ministry of Energy, Mines and Environment — oversees mineração and ambiental policy. ONEE — manages water supply infrastructure.
Parlement du Maroc — bicameral: Chambre des Représentants (395 members) and Chambre des Conseillers (120 members). Morocco is a monarquia constitucional with an elected parliament.

MC.s: City-state ($11.1B PIB) with 87.2% services. Major financial center and tourism hub. No income tax for individuals. World's highest PIB per capita and population density. Limited PST exposure except through financial intermediation.

sectors.w: Monaco's financial services facilitate wealth management with favorable tax treatment. Quando beneficial ownership and tax transparência data are published, W se torna computável.
bp: Full compliance with OECD Global Forum transparência standards and CRS information exchange. Quando opacity is eliminated, the interesse sobreposto enfraquece.
Publication of aggregate beneficial ownership and capital flow data. Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Financial services can relocate but Monaco's brand and geographic advantages create switching costs.

Conseil National — Monaco's unicameral parliament, 24 members. Monaco is a monarquia constitucional (Prince Albert II). Moneyval (Council of Europe) evaluates Monaco's AML framework.

MD.s: Small Eastern European economia ($18.2B PIB). Agricultura a 7.1% PIB (wine, agriculture). Serviços a 62.3%. candidato à UE country (2022). Significant remittance dependence. Energy dependent on Russian gas (via Transnistria).

sectors.w: Moldova's agricultural sector is dominated by grain monoculture on degraded chernozem soils. Quando soil health data is linked to agricultural output, W se torna computável.
bp: EU accession agricultural alignment — CAP-style ambiental conditionality. Quando subsidies reward soil health, o interesse sobreposto em exhaustive monoculture enfraquece.
Mandatory soil health monitoring per farm. Moldova's fertile chernozem soils are degrading — making this visible makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Grain monoculture degrades soil. Crop rotation and cover cropping can reduce dependência do sistema.

Parlamentul Republicii Moldova — unicameral, 101 members. Contact through parlament.md. Moldova is an candidato à UE country.

MG.s: Biodiversity hotspot economia ($17.4B PIB). Agricultura a 22.5% PIB. One of Earth's most biodiverse countries (90%+ species endemic). Devastating desmatamento (fr=5.45% forest rents). Mining growing (ilmenite, nickel). Extreme poverty.

sectors.w: Madagascar's slash-and-burn agriculture (tavy) has destroyed 90%+ of original forest. Quando desmatamento data is linked to agricultural output, W se torna computável.
bp: Alternative livelihood programs replacing tavy with agroforestry. Quando tree-crop income exceeds slash-and-burn yields, o interesse sobreposto em forest clearing breaks.
Satellite desmatamento monitoring linked to commune-level agricultural data. Torna W computável.
Extreme dependência do sistema. Tavy on degraded laterite soils causes erosion and desertification. Madagascar's red soil runoff is visible from space.

QMM (QIT Madagascar Minerals, Rio Tinto subsidiary) — ilmenite mineração. Ambatovy — nickel and cobalt mine (Sumitomo). Madagascar is the world's largest vanilla producer.
ONE (Office National pour l'Environnement) — the ambiental assessment authority. MEEF (Ministère de l'Environnement et de l'Écologie et des Forêts) — environment ministry.
Assemblée nationale de Madagascar — 151 members. Sénat — 18 members. Madagascar is a semi-presidential republic.

MK.s: Small Western Balkan economia ($17B PIB). Manufatura a 14.3% PIB. Serviços a 56.2%. candidato à UE country. Coal-dependent energy. Agricultura a 6.1% PIB.

sectors.w: North Macedonia's lignite dependence (Bitola power plant) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make coal uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring ETS alignment. Coal becomes uncompetitive at EU carbon prices.
Per-plant emissões and health cost disclosure. Torna W computável.
Não é possível quebrar. Coal combustion releases pollutants.

ERC (Energy Regulatory Commission) — regulador de energia. Energy Community Treaty membership requires EU energy acquis alignment.
Sobranie (Assembly of North Macedonia) — unicameral, 120 members. candidato à UE country.

ML.s: Sahelian economia ($26.8B PIB) with gold mineração (16.18% PIB) and agriculture (33.3% PIB). Military junta since 2020-2021 coups. Security crisis (jihadist insurgency). Third-largest gold producer in Africa.

sectors.w: Mali's gold mineração generates mercury contamination (artisanal) and cyanide risks (industrial). Quando ambiental data is published alongside production, W se torna computável.
bp: International supply chain due diligence requiring mine-level ambiental compliance. Quando buyers verify conditions, o interesse sobreposto em unregulated extraction enfraquece.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring published through EITI. Mali's EITI membership provides the framework.
Parcialmente quebrável. Mining disturbs landscapes. Mercury-free processing can reduce artisanal mineração dependência do sistema.

i: DNGM — national geological and mineração directorate. Note: Mali is under military rule (CNSP). Civil society space is restricted.
Barrick Gold — operates Loulo-Gounkoto complex. B2Gold — operates Fekola mine. Resolute Mining — operates Syama mine. EITI Mali — member since 2006.
Ministry of Mines, Energy and Water — oversees mineração policy. Mali's 2019 Mining Code establishes ambiental obligations.
Note: Military transition government. National Transitional Council replaces elected legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Mali suspended), African Union, EITI Board.

MM.s: Resource-rich economia ($74.1B PIB) under military junta since 2021 coup. Rendas do gás 4.4%. Jade and gem mineração (est. $31B/year — more than formal PIB). Agricultura a 20.8% PIB. Civil war affecting multiple regions.

sectors.w: Myanmar's jade industry is largely opaque — estimated at $31B/year but mostly unrecorded. Quando jade revenue flows are made visible (Global Witness has documented significant flows to military), W se torna computável.
bp: International sanções targeting jade and gem revenues flowing to the military junta. Quando revenue is blocked, the interesse sobreposto between the military and jade mineração enfraquece.
Supply chain transparência for jade and gems using blockchain traceability. Global Witness and others have documented the flows — formalizing this breaks system independence.
Parcialmente quebrável. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. Myanmar's jade mines in Kachin State have caused catastrophic landslides.

Myanmar Gems Enterprise — military-controlled entity managing gem auctions. International buyers increasingly apply conflict mineral frameworks to Myanmar sourcing.

The National Unity Government (NUG) — the democratic opposition government in exile — has proposed alternative governance frameworks. International channels: ASEAN (Special Envoy process), UN Human Rights Council, targeted sanções by US, EU, UK.

MN.s: Resource-dependent landlocked economia ($23.8B PIB). Mining at 26.57% PIB (copper, coal, gold). Coal at 4.89% PIB. Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto/Turquoise Hill). Parliamentary democracia — rare in the region.

sectors.w: Mongolia's mineração sector (particularly coal and copper) generates dust pollution and depletes water in the Gobi. Quando por mina ambiental data is linked to production revenue, W se torna computável.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees reflecting true scarcity. Quando mineração companies pay for water in arid steppe, o interesse sobreposto em water-intensive extraction enfraquece.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring data published through EITI Mongolia. Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Mining in arid environments inherently affects limited water resources. However, dry processing and water recycling can reduce dependence.

State Great Khural (Улсын Их Хурал) — unicameral parliament, 76 members. Contact through parliament.mn. Mongolia is a parlamentar democracia with competitive elections since 1990.

MO.s: Casino and tourism economia ($49.5B PIB). Serviços a 83.8% PIB. World's largest gambling market (pre-COVID revenue $36B/year). Under Chinese sovereignty. Highly concentrated gambling concession system.

sectors.w: Macao's gambling industry generates significant social costs (problem gambling, money laundering) that are not captured in concession revenues. Quando social cost data is published alongside gross gaming revenue, W se torna computável.
bp: Mandatory gambling harm data disclosure per concession. Quando social costs are visible alongside revenues, o interesse sobreposto em revenue maximization without harm mitigation enfraquece.

Parcialmente quebrável. Gambling inherently creates addiction risk. However, harm reduction measures (exclusion programs, betting limits) can reduce dependência do sistema.

Assembleia Legislativa de Macau — 33 members (14 directly elected, 12 indirectly elected, 7 appointed). Macao is a Special Administrative Region of China with limited autonomy.

MT.s: Small EU island economia ($25B PIB). Serviços a 81.8% (financial services, gaming, tourism). membro da UE. Major online gambling hub. No significant natural resources.

Kamra tad-Deputati (House of Representatives) — unicameral, 65+ members. Malta is an EU parlamentar democracia.

MU.s: Upper-middle-income island economia ($14.9B PIB). Serviços a 64.4% (financial services, tourism). Manufatura a 11.1% (textiles). Successful economic diversification from sugar to services. Strong institutions.

National Assembly of Mauritius — 70 members. Mauritius is a parlamentar democracia with strong democratic traditions since independence (1968).

MW.s: Low-income economia ($11.3B PIB). Agricultura a 31.8% PIB — tobacco is the largest export (50%+ of export revenue). One of the world's poorest countries. High climate vulnerability.

sectors.w: Malawi's tobacco dependence is an economic PST — tobacco demand is declining globally while the crop depletes soil. As WHO FCTC reduces demand, the interesse sobreposto between tobacco growers and buyers enfraquece.
bp: Crop diversification as global tobacco demand declines. Quando alternative crops (legumes, macadamia, soy) provide comparable income, o interesse sobreposto em tobacco monoculture breaks.
Publication of degradação do solo and health cost data alongside tobacco revenue. Torna W computável.
Tobacco cultivation depletes soil nutrients and requires heavy pesticide use. Crop rotation can reduce dependência do sistema.

National Assembly of Malawi — 193 members. Malawi is a presidential democracia. WHO FCTC Articles 17-18 require support for economically viable alternatives to tobacco growing.

MY.s: Upper-middle-income economia ($422.2B PIB). World's second-largest palm oil producer. Oil and gas at 5.2% rents (Petronas). Manufatura a 22.5% PIB (electronics, automotive). Serviços a 53.7%.

bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-desmatamento traceability. Quando buyers verify origin, o interesse sobreposto em forest conversion for plantations breaks.

Parcialmente quebrável. Palm oil monoculture reduces biodiversity. But yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce expansion pressure.

Parliament of Malaysia — bicameral: Dewan Rakyat (222 members) and Dewan Negara (70 members). Contact through parlimen.gov.my. Malaysia is a federal monarquia constitucional and parlamentar democracia.

MZ.s: Resource-rich developing economia ($22.7B PIB). Major gas discoveries (Rovuma Basin — among world's largest LNG projects). Coal at 3.78%, gas at 3.57%. Agricultura a 25.2% PIB. Insurgency in Cabo Delgado province near gas projects.

sectors.w: Mozambique's Rovuma Basin LNG projects (TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil, Eni) are among the world's largest but face force majeure due to insurgency. Quando per-project ambiental and social cost data is published, W se torna computável.
bp: Conditional development — LNG projects proceed only with binding community benefit and ambiental standards. Quando development is linked to social outcomes, o interesse sobreposto em extraction without accountability enfraquece.
Per-project ambiental disclosure for all Rovuma Basin operations. Torna W computável.
Não é possível quebrar. LNG production and combustion release CO₂ and methane.

NA.s: Upper-middle-income economia ($13.4B PIB) with mineração at 3.17% (uranium, diamonds). Agricultura a 7.3% PIB. One of Africa's most stable democracies. Major new oil discoveries offshore (TotalEnergies, Shell). Green hydrogen ambitions.

NE.s: Sahelian economia ($19.9B PIB). Agricultura a 34.5% PIB. Uranium mineração (Arlit — supplies ~5% of world production, Orano/formerly Areva). Oil production growing. Military junta since July 2023 coup.

Per-mine ambiental monitoring. Torna W computável.

NP.s: Mountainous South Asian economia ($42.9B PIB). Agricultura a 21.9% PIB. Massive hydropower potential (~83 GW technically feasible, only ~2.3 GW developed). Remittances ~25% of PIB. Climate-vulnerable (glacial lake outburst floods).

sectors.w: Nepal's agriculture on steep hillsides causes erosion and landslides. Quando per-district soil loss and water quality data is linked to agricultural output, W se torna computável.
bp: Reformar agricultural support toward terracing and agroforestry on hillsides. Quando hillside farmers are incentivized to conserve soil, o interesse sobreposto em unsustainable cultivation enfraquece.

Federal Parliament — bicameral: Pratinidhi Sabha (275 members) and Rashtriya Sabha (59 members). Nepal is a federal democratic republic since 2008.

NZ.s: Advanced economia ($260.2B PIB) with intensive dairy farming driving agricultural exports. Agricultura a 4.4% PIB but outsized ambiental footprint (dairy is largest export sector). Serviços a 64.6%. Strong democratic institutions. Ambitious climate targets.

sectors.w: New Zealand's dairy intensification (6.3M dairy cows) has degraded waterways (nitrogen and E. coli contamination). Quando per-farm nutrient discharge data is published alongside farm revenue, W se torna computável.
bp: Implementar the NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) requiring bottom lines for water quality. Quando farmers face enforceable nutrient caps, o interesse sobreposto em herd expansion enfraquece.
Farm Environment Plans with mandatory public nutrient discharge data. NZ's 'He Waka Eke Noa' partnership generates farm-level data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Ruminant digestion produces methane biologically. Feed additives can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane. Riparian planting reduces but doesn't eliminate nutrient runoff.

NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) — requires regional councils to set limits on resource use to achieve ambiental bottom lines. MPI — oversees primary sector policy.

New Zealand Parliament (House of Representatives, 120 members, MMP electoral system). Contact through parliament.nz. NZ Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act 2019 sets separate targets for biogenic methane.

OM.s: Oil-dependent Gulf economia ($107.1B PIB) with 29.21% combined oil and gas rents. PDO (Petroleum Desenvolverment Oman, 60% government, 34% Shell) is the main operator. Diversifying through Oman Vision 2040. Hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Oman's oil production uses enhanced oil recovery (EOR) including solar-powered steam injection. As EOR costs rise on mature fields, diversification to green hydrogen becomes economically rational.
bp: Green hydrogen investment as alternative export commodity. Oman has committed $30B+ to green hydrogen projects. Quando hydrogen revenue streams are established, o interesse sobreposto em oil dependence enfraquece.

Não é possível quebrar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

Majlis Oman — bicameral: Majlis al-Shura (86 elected) and Majlis al-Dawla (86 appointed). Oman is a sultanate with limited but growing parlamentar activity.

PA.s: Services-dominant economia ($86.5B PIB) with the Panama Canal generating significant revenue. Financial services hub. Mining at 3.58% (Cobre Panamá copper mine — First Quantum, closed by Supreme Court ruling 2023). Serviços a 69.3%.

sectors.w: Panama's Supreme Court ruled the Cobre Panamá mineração contract unconstitutional in November 2023, following massive public protests. The interesse sobreposto between the mineração company and government has been broken by democratic action.
bp: The Cobre Panamá precedent — democratic rejection of mineração contracts that do not serve the public interest. This is a direct break of the interesse sobreposto through civic action and judicial review.
Environmental monitoring of mine closure and remediation. Making closure costs visible makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. The mine exists — remediation is needed regardless. Closure reduces ongoing dependência do sistema.

Ministerio de Comercio e Industrias — oversees mineração concessions. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office.

Asamblea Nacional de Panamá — unicameral, 71 members. Panama's Cobre Panamá case is a globally significant precedent for democratic control over extractive industries. First Quantum has filed an ICSID arbitration claim.

PE.s: Resource-rich economia ($289.2B PIB) with mineração at 12.1% PIB (world's second-largest copper producer, major silver and gold). Agricultura a 7.3%. Serviços a 51.3%. Social conflicts around mineração are frequent.

sectors.w: Peru's mineração sector generates over 200 active social conflicts (Defensoría del Pueblo tracks monthly). Quando ambiental monitoring data is publicly linked to mine production revenue, W se torna computável.
bp: Prior consultation (consulta previa) enforcement per ILO Convention 169. Quando indigenous communities can effectively negotiate ambiental conditions, o interesse sobreposto em extraction without consent enfraquece.
Mandatory por mina ambiental monitoring data published in real-time (OEFA already collects this). Public disclosure makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Mining disturbs landscapes. But Peru's mineração ambiental standards have improved significantly — enforcement is the gap.

Congreso de la República del Perú — unicameral, 130 members. Contact through congreso.gob.pe. Peru has ratified ILO Convention 169. Peru has not ratified the Escazú Agreement.

PG.s: Resource-rich Pacific island economia ($31.8B PIB). Mining at 14.41% PIB, gas at 9.14% (PNG LNG). Agricultura a 16.4%. Extraordinary biodiversity (7% of world's species on 1% of land). Customary land ownership covers 97% of territory.

sectors.w: PNG's mineração sector (Ok Tedi, Porgera, Lihir) has a history of catastrophic ambiental damage. Ok Tedi mine discharged tailings directly into the Fly River system for decades. Environmental monitoring makes W computable.

Parcialmente quebrável. Mining in tropical environments disturbs highly biodiverse ecosystems. But modern tailings management (not riverine disposal) can reduce dependência do sistema.

National Parliament of Papua New Guinea — unicameral, 111 members. PNG is a monarquia constitucional (King Charles III as head of state) with Westminster-style parlamentar democracia.

PH.s: Major Southeast Asian economia ($461.6B PIB). Serviços a 63.2% PIB. Agricultura a 9.1%. Mining at 1.52% (nickel — world's second-largest producer). Manufatura a 15.7% (electronics). Extreme climate vulnerability — typhoons.

Congress of the Philippines — bicameral: House of Representatives (316 members) and Senate (24 members). Contact through congress.gov.ph. Philippines is a presidential democracia.

PK.s: Large economia ($371.6B PIB) with agriculture at 23.7% PIB (cotton, wheat, rice, sugarcane). Manufatura a 13.2%. Serviços a 50.7%. Severe climate vulnerability (2022 floods caused $30B+ damage). Water stress. Coal at 0.12%, gas at 0.74%.

Per-district groundwater monitoring and soil health data. WAPDA already monitors water — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.

Parliament of Pakistan — bicameral: National Assembly (342 members) and Senate (100 members). Contact through na.gov.pk. Pakistan is a federal parlamentar democracia.

PL.s: Major EU economia ($917.8B PIB) with significant coal sector (0.25% rents but coal provides ~70% of electricity). Manufatura a 16.1% PIB. Serviços a 59.1%. Coal transition is Poland's central climate challenge — 80,000+ miners.

sectors.w: Poland's coal sector is sustained by state subsidies and employment guarantees. EU ETS carbon pricing makes Polish coal uncompetitive. Quando full carbon costs are internalized, the interesse sobreposto between miners and state employment programs breaks.
bp: EU ETS alignment without free allowances. At €90/ton carbon, Polish coal electricity costs 2-3x renewable alternatives. The interesse sobreposto breaks when coal plants cannot compete.
Per-plant emissões and health-impact disclosure. Poland's coal plants cause 4,000+ premature deaths/year. Making health costs visible per MWh makes W computable.

i: GIOŚ (Główny Inspektorat Ochrony Środowiska) — the chief ambiental inspectorate. GIS (Główny Inspektorat Sanitarny) — the chief sanitary inspectorate monitoring public health. Poland transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2024.

PGE (Polska Grupa Energetyczna) — Poland's largest energy company. Tauron, Enea — other major energy companies. PGG (Polska Grupa Górnicza) — Poland's largest coal mineração company (estatal, ~40,000 employees).

URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — the regulador de energia. NFEP (Narodowy Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska) — the ambiental fund financing green transition. Poland's coal phase-out agreement with mineração unions targets 2049.

Sejm (460 members) and Senat (100 members). Contact through sejm.gov.pl and senat.gov.pl. EU Just Transition Fund — Poland is the largest recipient of JTF funding. Poland's 2020 coal phase-out agreement targets closure of all coal mines by 2049.

PR.s: US unincorporated territory ($126B PIB) with pharmaceutical manufacturing (44.1% of PIB — among world's highest pharma concentration). Serviços a 51.8%. Post-Hurricane Maria (2017) infrastructure challenges. LUMA Energy electricity crisis.

bp: Reformar food import tax structure to incentivize fresh food over UPF. Quando imported UPF faces higher tariffs than fresh food, o interesse sobreposto em high-margin processed imports enfraquece.

PS.s: Occupied territory ($13.7B PIB, severely constrained by occupation). Agricultura a 7.4% PIB. Serviços a 76.2%. Economy dependent on Israeli work permits and international aid. Water access severely restricted. Active conflict zone.

sectors.w: Palestinian agriculture operates under severe water restrictions (Oslo II Accords limit Palestinian water extraction). Quando water allocation data is published alongside agricultural output, the systemic welfare impact of occupation on agriculture becomes computable.
bp: International pressure for equitable water allocation per Oslo II renegotiation. Quando Palestinian farmers access fair water shares, o interesse sobreposto em restricting agricultural development enfraquece.
Publication of per-community water allocation and agricultural productivity data. International monitoring (OCHA, World Bank) already collects data — systematic disclosure makes W computable.
Extreme dependência do sistema. The occupation structurally constrains agricultural development through water restrictions, land access, and movement controls.

PWA — the key institution managing water allocation under occupation constraints. Joint Water Committee (JWC) — the Oslo-established mechanism for water cooperation between Israel and Palestine, widely criticized as inequitable.

Palestinian Legislative Council (PLC, 132 members) — non-functional since 2007. The Palestinian Authority operates through the executive. International channels: UNGA, UNHRC, ICJ Advisory Opinion on the Wall (2004), UN OCHA, UNRWA.

Jerónimo Martins (Pingo Doce) — major Portuguese retailer. FIPA (Federação das Indústrias Portuguesas Agro-Alimentares) — food industry federation.
DGS (Direção-Geral da Saúde) — public health authority. SNS — the national health service.
Assembleia da República — unicameral, 230 members. Contact through parlamento.pt. Portugal is a parlamentar democracia.

PY.s: Landlocked South American economia ($44.5B PIB). Agricultura a 10.7% PIB (massive soy production — 4th largest exporter globally). Manufatura a 19% PIB. Serviços a 48.7%. Itaipú Dam provides 90%+ renewable electricity. Severe desmatamento from soy expansion.

sectors.w: Paraguay's soy monoculture has destroyed 90%+ of Atlantic Forest and drives ongoing Chaco desmatamento. Quando per-farm desmatamento and degradação do solo data is linked to soy exports, W se torna computável.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-desmatamento soy. Quando EU buyers require verified desmatamento-free origin, o interesse sobreposto em Chaco clearing for soy breaks.
Satellite-based desmatamento monitoring linked to soy export data. Global Forest Watch already tracks Paraguay extensively — linking to farm-level data makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Soy monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. But no-till farming and cover cropping can reduce degradação do solo.

i: SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente) — now MADES (Ministerio del Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible). INFONA (Instituto Forestal Nacional) — the forest management authority. INDI — the indigenous affairs institute.
Major soy traders operating in Paraguay: Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus. CAPPRO (Cámara Paraguaya de Procesadores de Oleaginosas y Cereales) — the oilseed processors' association.
MADES — environment ministry. Zero Deforestation Law (Ley 2524/2004) — prohibits conversion of forest to agriculture in the Eastern Region (but not the Chaco, where desmatamento continues).
Congreso Nacional del Paraguay — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (80 members) and Cámara de Senadores (45 members). Paraguay is a presidential republic.

QA.s: Hydrocarbon-dominated economia ($219.2B PIB). Indústria a 58.2% PIB. Rendas do petróleo 15.28% PIB, gas rents 12.01% PIB — world's largest LNG exporter. Serviços a 46.1%. Highest per-capita CO₂ emissões globally. Absolute monarchy.

sectors.w: Qatar's LNG dominance faces demand erosion as importing nations (Japan, South Korea, EU) diversify toward renewables and hydrogen. Quando importers reduce LNG dependence, the interesse sobreposto enfraquece.
bp: Importer diversification away from Qatari LNG. As Japan, Korea, and Europe invest in renewables and green hydrogen, o interesse sobreposto em fossil gas dependence enfraquece.
Per-field emissões and flaring data disclosure. Qatar Energy already publishes aggregate sustainability data — extending to field-level reporting makes W computable.
Não é possível quebrar. LNG combustion releases CO₂. Carbon capture on LNG (pre-combustion at liquefaction) captures only a fraction of lifecycle emissões.

i: QatarEnergy (formerly Qatar Petroleum) — the state hydrocarbon company controlling all oil and gas operations. International partners operate under production-sharing agreements.
QatarEnergy — estatal, operates the world's largest LNG facility at Ras Laffan Industrial City. North Field — the world's largest non-associated gas field.
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change — ambiental regulator. KAHRAMAA — electricity and water utility. Qatar National Vision 2030 — the national strategic framework.

Qatar is an absolute monarchy — the Emir governs by decree. Advisory Shura Council (45 members, 30 elected since 2021) has limited legislative power. International channels: GCC, OPEC (Qatar withdrew 2019 but re-engaged), COP process.

RO.s: membro da UE economia ($382.6B PIB). Manufatura a 13.2% PIB. Rendas do gás 0.53%, oil 0.38%. Serviços a 62.6%. Significant forestry issues — illegal logging in old-growth Carpathian forests despite membro da UEship.

sectors.w: Romania's large-scale agricultural land consolidation has created monoculture on former smallholdings. Quando soil health data is linked to EU CAP payments, W se torna computável.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme conditionality. Quando subsidy payments depend on crop rotation and soil health metrics, o interesse sobreposto em exhaustive monoculture enfraquece.
Per-farm soil health monitoring through APIA (Agency for Payments and Intervention in Agriculture). Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Grain monoculture degrades Romania's fertile black-earth soils. Cover cropping and crop rotation reduce dependência do sistema.

i: Garda Forestieră — Romania's forest guard, responsible for enforcing the Forest Code. Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură — state forestry inspectorate. Agent Green — Romanian ambiental NGO documenting illegal logging.
Romania has significant foreign-owned agricultural land. HS Timber (formerly Holzindustrie Schweighofer) — major timber processor, previously linked to illegal logging controversies.
APIA (Agenția de Plăți și Intervenție pentru Agricultură) — manages EU CAP payments. ANPM — ambiental protection agency. Ministry of Environment, Waters and Forests.
Parlamentul României — bicameral: Camera Deputaților (330 members) and Senat (136 members). membro da UE since 2007. Contact through cdep.ro and senat.ro.

RS.s: Western Balkan economia ($90.1B PIB). Manufatura a 12.7%. Rendas do carvão 0.24% PIB — but coal supplies ~70% of electricity. candidato à UE country. Mining sector growing (Rio Tinto lithium project controversy).

sectors.w: Serbia's lignite dependence (Nikola Tesla power plants — among Europe's worst SO₂ emitters) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make lignite uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring LCPD/IED compliance. Retrofitting Nikola Tesla A and B to meet EU emission limits costs more than replacement with renewables.
Per-plant emissões and health cost data. HEAL (Health and Environment Alliance) has documented thousands of premature deaths. Torna W computável.
Não é possível quebrar. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury.

i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — autoridade ambiental. CEKOR — Serbian ambiental NGO. RES Foundation — energia renovável advocacy.
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) — state electricity utility operating Nikola Tesla A (1650 MW) and B (1240 MW) lignite plants. Kolubara mineração basin — supplies lignite to these plants.
AERS (Agencija za energetiku Republike Srbije) — regulador de energia. Serbia is an Energy Community Treaty member, requiring alignment with EU energy acquis.
Narodna skupština (National Assembly) — unicameral, 250 members. candidato à UE country since 2012. Energy Community Treaty member.

RU.s: Major hydrocarbon economia ($2,173.8B PIB). Rendas do petróleo 9.67%, gas rents 5.86%, coal 0.61%, mineração 2.05% PIB. World's largest gas exporter, second-largest oil exporter. Gastos militares 7.05% PIB. Authoritarian governance under international sanções since 2022.

sectors.w: Russia's oil and gas revenues have been severely constrained by Western sanções and price caps since 2022. Buyer diversification (EU pivot away from Russian gas) is actively breaking the interesse sobreposto.
bp: Buyer diversification already underway. EU reduced Russian gas imports from ~40% to ~15% of supply. Quando importers eliminate dependence, o interesse sobreposto em Russian fossil fuels breaks.
Sanctions-enforced transparência — G7 price cap mechanism requires attestation of pricing. This partially makes W computable, though enforcement gaps remain.
Não é possível quebrar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ regardless of source.

i: Note: Russia's domestic sociedade civil is severely repressed. Bellona Foundation (Norway-based) — documents Russian ambiental issues. iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe — independent Russian media operating from exile.
Gazprom — state gas monopoly. Rosneft — state oil company. Most Western majors (Shell, BP, ExxonMobil) have exited Russian operations since 2022.
G7 Russian Oil Price Cap Coalition — enforces $60/barrel cap through insurance and shipping services. EU sanções packages (14+ rounds). OFAC (US), OFSI (UK) — sanções enforcement.

Note: Russia's Federal Assembly (Federalnoye Sobraniye — State Duma 450 members, Federation Council 170 members) does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: G7/G20 (Russia suspended from G8), UN General Assembly, international sanções coalitions.

RW.s: Small East African economia ($14.3B PIB). Agricultura a 24.6% PIB. Rendas florestais 3.97%. Serviços a 47.6%. Remarkable post-genocide development but autoritário governance. Strong ambiental policy (plastic bag ban pioneer).

sectors.w: Rwanda's hillside agriculture on steep terrain causes erosion and degradação do solo. Quando soil erosion data is linked to agricultural output per district, W se torna computável.
bp: Terracing and agroforestry expansion. Rwanda already has extensive terracing programs — extending to all cultivated hillsides with measurable soil retention targets breaks the interesse sobreposto.
Per-district soil erosion monitoring linked to agricultural productivity data. Rwanda's strong data infrastructure supports this. Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Hillside cultivation on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Terracing and contour farming reduce but cannot eliminate dependência do sistema.

i: REMA — the ambiental management authority. RAB — agricultural research and extension. Rwanda has strong institutional capacity relative to income level.
NAEB — manages agricultural export promotion (coffee, tea, pyrethrum). Rwanda's agricultural sector is organized through cooperatives and imihigo (performance contracts).
MINAGRI — agriculture ministry. RLMUA — land use authority. Rwanda's Vision 2050 includes ambiental sustainability targets.

Inteko Ishinga Amategeko (Parliament) — bicameral: Chamber of Deputies (80 members) and Senate (26 members). Note: Rwanda is effectively a one-party dominant state under RPF (Rwandan Patriotic Front). International channels: EAC (East African Community), AU, ICGLR.

SD.s: Conflict-affected economia ($49.7B PIB). Agricultura a 22.2% PIB. Mining 6.63% (gold). Rendas do petróleo 3.3% (reduced after South Sudan's independence). Civil war since April 2023 between SAF and RSF. Humanitarian catastrophe.

sectors.w: Sudan's artisanal gold mineração uses mercury extensively and generates revenue streams funding armed groups. Quando gold revenue flows are traced, W se torna computável.
bp: International supply chain due diligence blocking conflict gold. Quando refiners verify provenance, the interesse sobreposto between armed groups and gold revenues enfraquece.
Tracing gold flows from artisanal mines to international markets. LBMA (London Bullion Market Association) responsible sourcing standards provide the framework. Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Artisanal mineração uses mercury (Minamata Convention violation). Mercury-free processing methods exist but require investment.

i: Note: Sudan is in active civil war. No functioning domestic oversight exists. UN Panel of Experts — monitors sanções and conflict dynamics. IPIS (International Peace Information Service) — tracks artisanal mineração and conflict resources.
Sudan's gold primarily flows through UAE (Dubai) trading hubs. LBMA — sets responsible sourcing standards for gold refiners worldwide.
LBMA — London Bullion Market Association, responsible sourcing standard-setter. FATF (Financial Action Task Force) — can designate jurisdictions for gold laundering risks.

Note: Sudan's transitional government collapsed with the April 2023 war. No functioning legislature. International channels: UN Security Council, AU (African Union Peace and Security Council), IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on Desenvolverment).

SE.s: Advanced Nordic economia ($603.7B PIB). Manufatura a 13% PIB. Mining 1% PIB (iron ore — LKAB is Europe's largest). Serviços a 66.4%. Strong ambiental regulations. membro da UE. Leading in green steel transition (HYBRIT).

sectors.w: Sweden's iron ore mineração (LKAB) in northern Sweden affects Sami reindeer herding land and generates tailings. Quando por mina ambiental and indigenous impact data is published alongside production, W se torna computável.
bp: Full internalization of indigenous land-use costs and ambiental remediation. Quando LKAB pays for herding disruption and tailings management, o interesse sobreposto em low-cost extraction enfraquece.
Per-mine ambiental disclosure including impacts on Sami land use. LKAB publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verified indigenous impact assessments makes W computable.

Parcialmente quebrável. HYBRIT (Hydrogen Breakthrough Ironmaking Technology) — SSAB/LKAB/Vattenfall joint venture — is producing fossil-free steel, demonstrating that mineração's downstream dependência do sistema on carbon-intensive processing can be broken.
