i: Naturvårdsverket — ambiental protection agency. Bergsstaten — the mineração inspectorate, part of SGU (Sveriges geologiska undersökning — Geological Survey of Sweden). Sametinget — the Sami Parliament, representing indigenous Sami rights.
LKAB — estatal iron ore company, Europe's largest. SSAB — steel producer, partner in HYBRIT. Boliden — base metals mineração and smelting company. HYBRIT — world's first fossil-free steel initiative.
Mark- och miljödomstolarna — specialized ambiental courts. Sweden's Minerals Act (Minerallagen) governs mineração permits.
Riksdag — unicameral parliament, 349 members. Contact through riksdagen.se. Sweden is a monarquia constitucional and membro da UE.

SG.s: Advanced city-state economia ($547.4B PIB). Serviços a 73% PIB. Manufatura a 16.3% (electronics, petrochemicals). No natural resources. Major petrochemical refining hub and global financial center. World's busiest transshipment port.

sectors.w: Singapore is a major petrochemical refining and trading hub — the 'Houston of Asia.' Quando refinery emissões and fossil fuel trading flows are disclosed per facility, W se torna computável.
bp: Carbon tax escalation (Singapore's imposto de carbono rises to S$25/tCO₂ in 2024, S$45 in 2026, S$50-80 by 2030). Quando refining margins incorporate carbon costs, o interesse sobreposto em unpriced emissões enfraquece.
Per-refinery emissões and trade-flow disclosure. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) climate disclosure requirements extend to financial flows. Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Petrochemical refining inherently emits. However, Singapore's investment in sustainable aviation fuel and green hydrogen can reduce dependência do sistema over time.

i: NEA (National Environment Agency) — ambiental regulator. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) — financial regulator with expanding climate disclosure mandate. SGX — Singapore Exchange, requires climate reporting.
Jurong Island — Singapore's petrochemical hub hosting Shell, ExxonMobil, and other major refineries. DBS, OCBC, UOB — Singapore's three major banks with significant fossil fuel financing exposure.
EMA (Energy Market Authority) — regulador de energia. Singapore Green Plan 2030 — national sustainability framework. Carbon tax administered by NEA under Carbon Pricing Act.

Parliament of Singapore — unicameral. Singapore is a parlamentar republic with dominant-party governance (PAP — People's Action Party). Note: limited political pluralism in practice. International channels: ASEAN (founding member), IMO, UNFCCC.

SI.s: Small membro da UE economia ($73B PIB). Manufatura a 19.4% PIB. Serviços a 57.9%. Significant forest cover (60%+ of territory). membro da UE since 2004. Former Yugoslav republic with strong ambiental awareness.

sectors.w: Slovenia's intensive agriculture in lowland areas (Pomurje, Podravje) relies on monoculture grain and livestock. Quando soil and water quality data is linked to CAP payments, W se torna computável.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme implementation. Quando subsidy payments require biodiversity and soil health measures, o interesse sobreposto em exhaustive monoculture enfraquece.
Per-farm soil and water quality monitoring through ARSKTRP (Agency for Agricultural Markets and Rural Desenvolverment). Torna W computável.

Parcialmente quebrável. Grain monoculture and intensive livestock farming degrade soil and pollute groundwater. Organic farming and crop rotation reduce dependence — Slovenia already has 11%+ organic farming share.

i: ARSO — the Environment Agency of Slovenia. Umanotera — Slovenian Foundation for Sustainable Desenvolverment. Focus — ambiental NGO.
Slovenia's agricultural sector is dominated by small family farms (average 7 hectares). Kmetijsko gozdarska zbornica (Chamber of Agriculture and Forestry) — industry association.
ARSKTRP (Agencija za kmetijske trge in razvoj podeželja) — manages CAP payments. Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Food — policy ministry.
Državni zbor (National Assembly) — 90 members. Državni svet (National Council) — 40 members, advisory role. membro da UE since 2004. Alpine Convention member. Contact through dz-rs.si.

SK.s: Central European membro da UE ($140.9B PIB). Manufatura a 16.3% PIB — heavily auto-dependent (Volkswagen, Kia, Stellantis). Serviços a 60%. membro da UE since 2004. World's largest per-capita car producer.

sectors.w: Slovakia's food processing industry produces significant ultra-processed food for regional markets. Quando per-product health impact data (obesity, diabetes correlations) is disclosed alongside marketing spend, W se torna computável.
bp: EU front-of-pack labeling (Nutri-Score or equivalent). Quando consumers can identify ultra-processing, o interesse sobreposto em opaque ingredient lists enfraquece.
Mandatory per-product health impact disclosure. Slovakia has rising obesity rates (20%+). Linking UPF consumption data to health outcomes makes W computable.
Não é possível quebrar. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value and adds synthetic additives.

Slovakia's food retail is dominated by international chains (Lidl, Kaufland, Tesco, Billa). Slovenská poľnohospodárska a potravinárska komora — food industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — oversees dietary health policy. Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Desenvolverment — food production policy.
Národná rada Slovenskej republiky (National Council) — unicameral, 150 members. membro da UE since 2004. Contact through nrsr.sk.

SN.s: West African economia ($32.8B PIB). Agricultura a 16.6% PIB. Mining 2.9% (phosphates, gold, zircon). Offshore oil and gas discoveries (Sangomar field — first oil expected). Pesca crucial for food security. Democracy with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Senegal's fisheries face severe sobrepesca by foreign industrial fleets (EU, China) competing with artisanal pirogues. Quando per-vessel catch data is published alongside stock assessments, W se torna computável.
bp: Reformar fishing access agreements to limit foreign industrial fleet catch. Quando EU and Chinese DWF (Distant Water Fleet) quotas reflect stock sustainability, o interesse sobreposto em sobrepesca enfraquece.
VMS (Vessel Monitoring System) data publication and per-vessel catch reporting. Senegal has invested in MCS (Monitoring, Control and Surveillance). Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Industrial trawling damages benthic habitats. Artisanal fishing with selective gear reduces dependência do sistema.

i: DPSP — fisheries protection directorate. CNSP — national fisheries surveillance center, operates patrol vessels. Senegal has one of West Africa's most developed fisheries monitoring systems.
Senegal's fisheries employ ~600,000 people. Artisanal pirogues (wooden boats) land ~80% of total catch. GAIPES — fish exporters association.
Ministry of Pesca and Maritime Economy. CRODT — oceanographic research center providing stock assessments. CSRP — sub-regional fisheries commission for West Africa.

Assemblée nationale du Sénégal — unicameral, 165 members. Senegal is a presidential republic with a strong democratic tradition (peaceful power transitions in 2000, 2012, 2024). Contact through assemblee-nationale.sn.

SO.s: Fragile state ($12B PIB). Limited economic data available. Rendas florestais 11.24% PIB (charcoal — major desmatamento driver). Charcoal trade linked to Al-Shabaab financing. Ongoing conflict and state fragility.

sectors.w: Somalia's charcoal production devastates acacia forests and finances armed groups. Quando charcoal trade flows are traced and linked to desmatamento data, W se torna computável.
bp: UN Security Council charcoal export ban enforcement (Resolution 2036). Quando the ban is effectively enforced, the interesse sobreposto between Al-Shabaab revenue and charcoal trade enfraquece.
Satellite desmatamento monitoring linked to charcoal trade routes. UN Monitoring Group has documented the flows. Torna W computável.
Não é possível quebrar. Charcoal production from slow-growing acacia in arid Somali climate causes irreversible desertification.

Documentar através de Somali ambiental organizations where operational
Report charcoal shipments to naval forces (EU NAVFOR, Combined Maritime Forces)
Shipping companies: Screen for Somali charcoal cargoes

Alternative energy providers: Investir em LPG distribution as charcoal substitute

Gulf state customs: Screen for Somali charcoal imports

Support UN Security Council charcoal ban enforcement
Advocate for Gulf state cooperation on import screening

Support Somali Disaster Resilience Institute ambiental programs
i: UN Monitoring Group on Somalia and Eritrea — monitors sanções including the charcoal ban. EU NAVFOR (Operation Atalanta) — maritime security operation. Note: domestic institutional capacity is extremely limited.
Somali charcoal is primarily exported to Gulf states via dhow networks. UAE has been the largest market. Some companies are promoting LPG as an alternative cooking fuel.
Federal Government of Somalia — limited authority outside Mogadishu. Federal Member States have varying governance capacity. UN sanções framework provides the primary regulatory tool.

Federal Parliament of Somalia — bicameral: House of the People (275 members) and Upper House (54 members). Note: clan-based indirect elections, limited institutional capacity. International channels: UN, AU (ATMIS — AU Transition Mission in Somalia), IGAD.

SV.s: Small Central American economia ($35.4B PIB). Serviços a 61% PIB. Agricultura a 4.4%. Manufatura a 12%. Significant remittance dependence (~24% of PIB). Bitcoin adopted as legal tender (2021). State of exception since 2022.

sectors.w: El Salvador's sugarcane monoculture in coastal lowlands is linked to chronic kidney disease of unknown etiology (CKDu) among agricultural workers — one of the highest rates globally. Quando CKDu data is linked to agrochemical exposure per farm, W se torna computável.
bp: Agrochemical regulation and worker health monitoring. Quando sugarcane operations internalize CKDu health costs, o interesse sobreposto em unregulated pesticide/herbicide use enfraquece.
Per-farm agrochemical use and worker health outcome data. El Salvador has the world's highest CKDu mortality. Linking these datasets makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Sugarcane monoculture depletes soils and concentrates agrochemical exposure. Crop diversification and organic practices reduce dependência do sistema.
a: Reportar a MARN (Ministerio de Medio Ambiente y Recursos Naturales)
Document worker health impacts through ISSS (Instituto Salvadoreño del Seguro Social)
Reportar a MAG (Ministerio de Agricultura y Ganadería)
Sugar mills (ingenios): Implementar worker heat stress and agrochemical exposure protocols
Adotar mechanized harvesting to reduce worker field exposure
Investir em worker kidney screening programs
Ministry of Health: Establish CKDu surveillance and prevention program
MARN: Regulate agrochemical use in sugarcane production
MAG: Support crop diversification away from monoculture sugarcane
Engage through available legislative channels — Asamblea Legislativa (84 members); note concentrated executive power under current governance
Support SICA (Central American Integration System) regional CKDu response
Advogar através de PAHO/WHO for CKDu research and prevention funding
Pressionar por ILO conventions on agricultural worker health protection
i: MARN — Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources. ISSS — social security institute. MAG — agriculture ministry. La Isla Network — international NGO documenting CKDu in Central America.
El Salvador's sugar industry is concentrated among a few large ingenios (sugar mills). CAMAGRO (Cámara Agropecuaria y Agroindustrial) — agricultural industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — responsible for CKDu response. MARN — ambiental regulation.
Asamblea Legislativa — unicameral, 84 members. Note: since 2021, executive dominance over legislature; limited separation of powers in practice. International channels: SICA, PAHO, ILO.

SY.s: War-devastated economia ($23.6B PIB). Agricultura a 43.1% PIB — unusually high due to industrial collapse. Rendas do petróleo 4.02%, gas 2.33%. Civil war since 2011 has destroyed infrastructure. Ongoing political transition (2024-2025).

sectors.w: Syria's oil infrastructure has been contested between factions (SDF/AANES controls northeastern fields, former regime controlled refineries). Quando oil revenue flows are transparently traced through reconstruction, W se torna computável.
bp: Post-conflict transparent governance of oil revenues. Quando reconstruction frameworks require accountable revenue management, o interesse sobreposto em opaque extraction enfraquece.
Oil revenue flow transparência as condition of reconstruction assistance and sanções relief. Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Oil infrastructure has been extensively damaged — reconstruction offers opportunity to build in ambiental standards.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations
Document ambiental damage from conflict-era oil infrastructure destruction
Report through UN OCHA coordination mechanisms
International reconstruction companies: Adotar ambiental standards in oil infrastructure rebuilding
Apply conflict-sensitivity to investment decisions
Require transparent revenue sharing in any production agreements
Transitional governance: Establish transparent hydrocarbon revenue management
International community: Condition reconstruction support on ambiental and governance standards
EITI: Support Syrian membership as part of governance transition
Support international frameworks conditioning reconstruction assistance on transparent resource governance
Advogar através de UN-led political process for resource revenue transparência
Pressionar por ambiental damage assessment and remediation in reconstruction plans
Support EITI membership for post-transition Syria
i: Note: Syria is in post-conflict transition. Institutional capacity is severely degraded. Multiple governance structures operate in different regions.
Pre-war: Syrian Petroleum Company (state oil company). Current: fragmented control over oil infrastructure.
Regulatory capacity must be rebuilt as part of political transition.

Note: Syria is undergoing political transition following the fall of the Assad regime (late 2024). New governance structures are forming. International channels: UN (Security Council, Special Envoy), Arab League (membership restored 2023), reconstruction donor conferences.

TD.s: Sahelian economia ($19.5B PIB). Rendas do petróleo 16.75% PIB. Agricultura a 37.7%. Rendas florestais 4.58%. One of the world's poorest countries. Military transitional government. Lake Chad shrinking (~90% since 1960s).

sectors.w: Chad's oil revenues flow through an opaque pipeline (Doba basin to Kribi, Cameroon). The World Bank's original revenue transparência mechanism (Collège de Contrôle) was dismantled. Quando oil revenue allocation is made transparent, W se torna computável.
bp: Restore oil revenue transparência mechanisms. The World Bank's original Chad-Cameroon pipeline project required transparent revenue allocation — this was dismantled. Rebuilding it breaks o interesse sobreposto em opaque revenue flows.
Oil revenue flow disclosure through EITI. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023 for governance failures. Restoring compliance makes W computable.
Parcialmente quebrável. Oil production in arid Sahel strains water resources. However, the Doba basin fields are maturing and production declining.
a: Report through international oil company channels (CNPC has major presence)
Documentar através de international NGOs (Publish What You Pay, SWISSAID)
Reportar a international financial institutions
CNPC (China National Petroleum Corporation): Implementar ambiental and transparência standards
Savannah Energy: Adotar EITI-aligned reporting

Support international pressure for oil revenue transparência
Advogar através de African Union for governance reform and return to constitutional order
Pressionar por World Bank re-engagement on revenue management conditionality
Support Lake Chad Basin Commission ambiental programs
i: Note: Chad's sociedade civil space is severely restricted. Publish What You Pay — international revenue transparência coalition. SWISSAID — has worked on Chad extractives governance.

CNPC — operates major oil fields after acquiring former ExxonMobil assets. Savannah Energy — British company that acquired former Chevron assets. Chad-Cameroon pipeline — 1,070 km pipeline to Atlantic coast.
SHT — state oil company. Ministry of Petroleum, Mines and Energy — oversees hydrocarbons. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023.

Note: Military transitional government (Conseil Militaire de Transition, succeeded by elected government of Mahamat Déby, 2024). Conseil National de Transition — 93 members, appointed. International channels: AU, Lake Chad Basin Commission, CEMAC.

TG.s: Small West African economia ($10.7B PIB). Agricultura a 21.3% PIB. Mining 4.88% (phosphates — world's 5th largest producer). Serviços a 49.2%. Key transit port (Lomé). Governance concerns with limited political competition.

sectors.w: Togo's phosphate mineração (SNPT — Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) generates cadmium-contaminated waste. Quando por mina ambiental data is published, W se torna computável.
bp: International cadmium standards in phosphate products. Quando export markets require cadmium limits, o interesse sobreposto em unprocessed phosphate extraction enfraquece.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring data including cadmium levels, water contamination, and land rehabilitation. Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Phosphate rock contains cadmium. Cadmium removal technology exists and is commercially viable.
a: Reportar a ANGE (Agence Nationale de Gestion de l'Environnement)
Documentar através de community organizations in phosphate mineração regions (Hahotoé-Kpogamé)
Report through ITIE-Togo (EITI Togo) channels
SNPT: Investir em cadmium removal technology
Implementar mine rehabilitation for exhausted areas
Adotar international ambiental reporting standards
Ministry of Mines: Fortalecer ambiental conditions in mineração permits
ANGE: Aplicar ambiental impact assessment requirements

Engage through available parlamentar channels — note limited political pluralism under current governance
Support ECOWAS ambiental governance frameworks
Advocate for Codex Alimentarius cadmium limits in phosphate-derived fertilizers
Pressionar por EITI full membership with ambiental disclosure
i: ANGE — national ambiental management agency. ITIE-Togo — Togo is an EITI candidate country.
SNPT (Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) — the state phosphate company, privatized then renationalized. Operates mines in the Hahotoé-Kpogamé region.
Ministry of Mines and Energy — mineração oversight. ANGE — ambiental assessment authority.

Assemblée nationale du Togo — 113 members. Note: Togo has been governed by the Gnassingbé family since 1967; limited political competition. Constitutional change in 2024 shifted to parlamentar system. International channels: ECOWAS, AU, EITI.

TH.s: Major Southeast Asian economia ($526.5B PIB). Manufatura a 24.3% PIB (automotive, electronics, food processing). Agricultura a 8.7%. Serviços a 59.2%. World's largest rice exporter. Significant petrochemical sector. Constitutional monarchy.

sectors.w: Thailand is a major UPF producer and exporter (CP Group — Charoen Pokphand — is one of Asia's largest food conglomerates). Quando per-product health impact data is linked to marketing and formulation, W se torna computável.
bp: Front-of-pack labeling reform. Thailand's existing traffic-light label (GDA) covers some nutrients — extending to ultra-processing indicators enfraquece o interesse sobreposto em opaque formulation.
Per-product health outcome correlation data. Thailand's rising obesity and diabetes rates can be linked to UPF consumption patterns. Torna W computável.
Não é possível quebrar. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value.

i: Thai FDA — regulates food safety and labeling. ThaiHealth (สำนักงานกองทุนสนับสนุนการสร้างเสริมสุขภาพ) — independent health promotion agency funded by a 2% surcharge on tobacco and alcohol taxes.
CP Group — one of the world's largest agri-food conglomerates. Thai Union — global seafood company (owner of Chicken of the Sea). Thai Beverage (ThaiBev) — major food and beverage company.
Ministry of Public Health — health policy. Thai FDA — food regulation. Thailand's sugar tax (2017) is one of the region's most progressive.

รัฐสภา (National Assembly) — bicameral: สภาผู้แทนราษฎร (House of Representatives, 500 members) and วุฒิสภา (Senate, 200 members). Thailand is a monarquia constitucional. Recent democratic restoration (2023 elections).

TJ.s: Poorest Central Asian economia ($14.2B PIB). Mining 7.09% PIB (gold, silver, antimony). Agricultura a 19.7%. Aluminum smelting (TALCO). Remittance-dependent (~30% of PIB from Russia). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Tajikistan's mineração sector includes artisanal gold mineração with mercury use and the TALCO aluminum smelter (one of Central Asia's largest polluters). Quando per-facility emissões and ambiental data are published, W se torna computável.
bp: International buyer due diligence on Tajik mineral exports. Quando aluminum and gold buyers require ambiental compliance verification, o interesse sobreposto em unregulated production enfraquece.
Per-facility ambiental monitoring data. TALCO's fluoride emissões and gold mineração mercury contamination can be measured and disclosed. Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. TALCO smelter emissões can be reduced with modern pot-lining and scrubbing technology. Mercury-free gold processing exists.

i: Note: Civil society space in Tajikistan is severely restricted. International channels provide the primary avenue for ambiental reporting. EBRD and IFC have invested in Tajik mineração.
TALCO — state aluminum company, one of the world's largest smelters. Operates in Tursunzoda (formerly Regar). Gold mineração includes both industrial and artisanal operations.
Committee for Environmental Protection under the Government — ambiental regulator. Ministry of Industry and New Technologies — industrial oversight.

Majlisi Oli (Parliament) — bicameral: Majlisi Namoyandagon (lower, 63 members) and Majlisi Milli (upper, 33 members). Note: effectively estado de partido único (PDPT). International channels: OSCE, SCO, EITI.

TM.s: Gas-dependent closed economia ($51.4B PIB). Manufatura a 18% PIB. One of the world's most autoritário states. Massive gas reserves (Galkynysh — world's 2nd largest gas field). Data extremely limited — World Bank reports zeros for many indicators due to government opacity.

sectors.w: Turkmenistan is one of the world's largest methane emitters — satellite monitoring (Sentinel-5P, MethaneSAT) has revealed massive methane leaks from gas infrastructure. Quando methane data is published, W se torna computável despite government opacity.
bp: Satellite-based methane monitoring bypasses government opacity. Quando buyers (China — CNPC pipeline) face pressure to account for upstream methane, o interesse sobreposto em unmonitored gas production enfraquece.
Satellite methane emission monitoring (UNEP's IMEO — International Methane Emissions Observatory — has flagged Turkmenistan). Torna W computável without government cooperation.
Não é possível quebrar. Gas production and transport inherently leak methane, a greenhouse gas 80× more potent than CO₂ over 20 years.

Provide data to UNEP IMEO or satellite monitoring organizations

Support OSCE and UN human rights mechanisms for governance reform
i: Note: Turkmenistan is one of the world's most closed societies. No independent sociedade civil, media, or judiciary exists. Crude Accountability — international NGO documenting ambiental issues in the Caspian region. Turkmen.news — exile media.
Türkmengaz — state gas company. Türkmennebit — state oil company. CNPC — operates the Central Asia-China gas pipeline (Turkmenistan is the primary source). No independent corporate governance exists.
No independent domestic regulation exists. International monitoring provides the only oversight: UNEP IMEO, IEA Methane Tracker, satellite platforms (MethaneSAT, Sentinel-5P).

Mejlis (Parliament) — 125 members. Turkmenistan is an autoritário state — the legislature has no independent function. International channels: UN (UNEP, OHCHR), OSCE, CIS. Turkmenistan maintains permanent neutrality status (UN-recognized since 1995).

TN.s: North African economia ($51.3B PIB). Agricultura a 9.7% PIB. Rendas do petróleo 1.55%. Manufatura a 14.8%. Serviços a 62.6%. Birthplace of the Arab Spring (2011). Governance backsliding since 2021 presidential power consolidation.

sectors.w: Tunisia's oil and gas production is modest but state oil company ETAP's revenue flows lack transparência. Quando por campo ambiental and revenue data is published, W se torna computável.
bp: EITI-aligned revenue transparência. Tunisia's oil revenues are small relative to PIB but significant for the state budget. Transparent allocation breaks o interesse sobreposto em opaque revenue management.
Per-field ambiental monitoring and revenue flow disclosure. Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Tunisia's mature fields are declining. Solar energy potential is enormous (Saharan irradiance) and can reduce hydrocarbon dependence.

i: ANPE — ambiental protection agency. FTDES — Tunisian economic and social rights forum, active on ambiental justice. Tunisia has relatively active sociedade civil despite recent governance concerns.
ETAP — state oil company. ENI (Italy), OMV (Austria) — major international operators in Tunisia. Tunisia's South Energy Transition Program targets renewable expansion.
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy — hydrocarbons oversight. ANME — energy efficiency and energia renovável agency.

Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple — unicameral, 161 members. Note: since 2021, presidential power consolidation has weakened legislative independence. International channels: Arab League, AU, Union for the Mediterranean.

TR.s: Major middle-income economia ($1,359.1B PIB). Manufatura a 16.8% PIB. Serviços a 57.5%. NATO member. Mining 0.63%. Agricultura a 5.8%. Significant coal dependence for electricity. G20 member.

sectors.w: Türkiye is expanding coal capacity (including imported coal plants) despite having excellent renewable potential. Quando coal plant health costs are internalized, o interesse sobreposto em cheap coal power breaks.
bp: Carbon pricing or coal plant emission standards aligned with EU CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism). Türkiye's EU customs union makes CBAM relevant to industrial exports. Quando coal costs include carbon, renewables are cheaper.
Per-plant emissões and health cost data. Türkiye's coal plants are concentrated near population centers. HEAL and local NGOs have documented health costs. Torna W computável.
Não é possível quebrar. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.

Support NATO Green Defence Framework ambiental standards
i: ÇŞB — environment ministry. TEMA Vakfı — major Turkish ambiental NGO focused on soil and forest protection. Greenpeace Mediterranean — active in Türkiye on coal campaigns.
EÜAŞ — state electricity generation company. Significant private coal generation. Türkiye's 2053 net-zero target implies eventual coal phase-out but no timeline exists.
EPDK — energy market regulator. Türkiye ratified the Paris Agreement in 2021. EU Customs Union makes CBAM compliance relevant for Turkish industrial exports.

TBMM (Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi — Grand National Assembly) — unicameral, 600 members. Contact through tbmm.gov.tr. Türkiye is a presidential republic, NATO member, G20 member, EU customs union partner.

TT.s: Caribbean energy economia ($25.6B PIB). Rendas do gás 5.09%, oil rents 2.71% PIB. Major petrochemical and LNG producer (Atlantic LNG). Manufatura a 14.4%. Serviços a 59.2%. Parliamentary democracia.

sectors.w: Trinidad's petrochemical industry faces maturing gas fields and declining production. As reserves deplete and global LNG competition increases, o interesse sobreposto em fossil fuel dependence enfraquece naturally.
bp: Declining natural gas reserves force economic diversification. Quando production costs rise on mature fields, o interesse sobreposto em fossil fuel dependence enfraquece as alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-facility emissões and ambiental monitoring at Point Lisas industrial estate and Atlantic LNG. Torna W computável.
Não é possível quebrar. LNG and petrochemical processing emit CO₂ and other pollutants.
a: Reportar a EMA (Environmental Management Authority)
Reportar a MEEI (Ministry of Energy and Energy Industries)
Documentar através de Fishermen and Friends of the Sea (ambiental NGO)

i: EMA — the Environmental Management Authority, established under the Environmental Management Act 2000. Fishermen and Friends of the Sea — Trinidad's most active ambiental NGO.
NGC (National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago) — state gas company. Atlantic LNG — joint venture (Shell, BP, NGC). Point Lisas Industrial Estate — petrochemical complex.
MEEI — energy ministry. RIC — utilities regulator. Trinidad has extremely low domestic energy prices (subsidized), discouraging efficiency.
Parliament of Trinidad and Tobago — bicameral: House of Representatives (41 members) and Senate (31 members). Parliamentary democracia with competitive elections. Contact through ttparliament.org.

TZ.s: East African economia ($78.8B PIB). Agricultura a 23.3% PIB. Mining 4.03% (gold, tanzanite — found only in Tanzania). Rendas florestais 2.39%. Gas reserves (offshore). Serviços a 29.6%. Growing economia with improving governance.

sectors.w: Tanzania's gold mineração (Barrick/Twiga Minerals, AngloGold Ashanti) generates tailings and mercury contamination (artisanal sector). Quando por mina ambiental data is published alongside revenue, W se torna computável.
bp: Mining Act 2017 local content and transparência requirements. Quando enforced alongside ambiental monitoring, o interesse sobreposto em opaque extraction enfraquece.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring data through TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative). Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Mercury-free artisanal mineração and improved tailings management reduce dependência do sistema.

i: NEMC — autoridade ambiental. Mining Commission — mineração sector regulator. LEAT — Tanzanian ambiental law NGO. HakiRasilimali (Publish What You Pay Tanzania) — revenue transparência advocacy.

Twiga Minerals — 50/50 joint venture between Barrick Gold and Government of Tanzania (created after 2017 tax dispute). Geita Gold Mine — AngloGold Ashanti operation. STAMICO (State Mining Corporation) — government mineração entity.
Mining Commission — established under Mining Act 2017. TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member since 2009.

Bunge la Tanzania (National Assembly) — unicameral, 393 members. Tanzania is a presidential republic with increasing political openness under current administration. Contact through bunge.go.tz. EAC (East African Community) member.

UA.s: War-affected economia ($190.7B PIB). Mining 5.32% PIB. Gastos militares 34.48% PIB (wartime). Agricultura a 7.1%. Coal 0.34%. candidato à UE country (2022). Under Russian invasion since February 2022. Massive ambiental damage from war.

sectors.w: Ukraine's mineração sector (iron ore, manganese, titanium) has suffered massive ambiental damage from the Russian invasion — flooded mines, destroyed infrastructure, contaminated land. Post-war reconstruction offers opportunity for transparent ambiental standards. Quando reconstruction ambiental data is published, W se torna computável.
bp: EU accession conditionality requiring ambiental standards in post-war reconstruction. Quando reconstruction adheres to EU ambiental acquis, o interesse sobreposto em rapid but dirty rebuilding enfraquece.
Environmental damage assessment and remediation tracking. Ukraine's Ministry of Environmental Protection is already documenting war damage with international support. Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes, but post-war reconstruction can implement best-practice tailings management and water treatment from the start.

Pressionar por international ambiental damage assessment and Russian liability for war-related ambiental destruction
i: Derzhekoinspektsiia — State Environmental Inspectorate. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources — documents war-related ambiental damage. Ecodozor — citizen reporting platform.
Metinvest — Ukraine's largest steel and mineração group (Rinat Akhmetov). ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih — major steel producer. Ferrexpo — iron ore pellet producer.
Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources. State Subsoil Service (Derzhgeonadra) — mineração licensing. Ukraine's EU candidacy requires ambiental acquis alignment.

Verkhovna Rada — unicameral, 450 members. Contact through rada.gov.ua. candidato à UE country since 2022. International channels: EU accession process, Ukraine Recovery Conference, International Criminal Court (ambiental damage documentation).

UG.s: East African economia ($53.9B PIB). Agricultura a 24.6% PIB. Rendas florestais 7.48% (one of the highest in the dataset). Oil production beginning (Tilenga and Kingfisher projects, EACOP pipeline). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Uganda's new oil projects (TotalEnergies' Tilenga and CNOOC's Kingfisher, plus EACOP — East African Crude Oil Pipeline) face massive international scrutiny. Quando project-level ambiental data is published, W se torna computável.
bp: International ESG pressure on project financiers. Quando banks and insurers withdraw from EACOP financing, o interesse sobreposto em unscrutinized pipeline construction enfraquece. Several major banks have already declined.
Per-project ambiental impact data for Tilenga (in Murchison Falls National Park), Kingfisher, and EACOP. Torna W computável.
Não é possível quebrar. Crude oil production and 1,443-km heated pipeline through sensitive ecosystems inherently create ambiental risk.
a: Reportar a NEMA (National Environment Management Authority)
Documentar através de international ambiental organizations (350.org, BankTrack)
Report through TotalEnergies compliance channels

NEMA: Fortalecer ambiental monitoring of oil projects

Support East African Court of Justice jurisdiction on transboundary ambiental issues
i: NEMA — autoridade ambiental. Note: Ugandan ambiental activists have faced government harassment. International channels are safer: 350.org has led the #StopEACOP campaign. BankTrack monitors EACOP financing.

TotalEnergies — operator of Tilenga project and EACOP. CNOOC Uganda — operates Kingfisher project. EACOP (East African Crude Oil Pipeline) — 1,443 km from Hoima to Tanga (Tanzania). UNOC (Uganda National Oil Company) — state oil company.
PAU — petroleum sector regulator. MEMD — energy and mineral development ministry. Uganda's Petroleum Revenue Management policy is under development.

Parliament of Uganda — unicameral, 529 members. Note: Uganda is effectively under one-party dominant governance (NRM). International channels: EAC (East African Community), African Court on Human and Peoples' Rights, European Parliament (regarding EU-headquartered companies like TotalEnergies).

UY.s: Small South American economia ($81B PIB). Agricultura a 6.4% PIB. Serviços a 65.3%. Rendas florestais 1.91%. Generates nearly 100% of electricity from renewables (wind, hydro, solar, biomass). Strong democracia — one of Latin America's most stable.

sectors.w: Uruguay's soy and eucalyptus monoculture expansion is degrading soils and displacing native grasslands (campos). Quando soil health and biodiversity data is linked to agricultural production per department, W se torna computável.
bp: National soil conservation plan enforcement. Uruguay's Ley de Uso y Conservación de Suelos (Soil Use and Conservation Law) requires mandatory soil plans — strengthening enforcement breaks o interesse sobreposto em soil-exhaustive monoculture.
Per-farm soil erosion and grassland conversion monitoring. MGAP already requires Plan de Uso y Manejo de Suelos for farms >50 ha. Publishing compliance data makes W computable.

Parcialmente quebrável. Soy monoculture and eucalyptus plantations degrade native grassland ecosystems. Integrated crop-livestock systems and native grassland preservation reduce dependência do sistema.
a: Reportar a DINAMA (Dirección Nacional de Medio Ambiente)
Reportar a RENARE (Dirección General de Recursos Naturales Renovables)
Documentar através de Vida Silvestre Uruguay
Large agricultural companies: Fortalecer soil conservation plan compliance
UPM, Montes del Plata (forestry): Maintain native grassland corridors between eucalyptus plantations
Meat exporters: Adotar pasture-based certification
MGAP (Ministerio de Ganadería, Agricultura y Pesca): Aplicar mandatory soil plans
DINAMA: Fortalecer ambiental assessment for land-use change

Support Mercosur ambiental cooperation frameworks
Advocate for native grassland (campos) conservation in international biodiversity frameworks
Pressionar por soil carbon accounting in climate commitments
i: DINAMA — national environment directorate. RENARE — renewable natural resources directorate under MGAP. Vida Silvestre Uruguay — biodiversity conservation organization.
UPM (Finnish company) — major eucalyptus plantation and pulp mill operator. Montes del Plata (UPM/Arauco) — forestry. Large-scale soy farming often by Brazilian/Argentine operators.
MGAP — agriculture, livestock and fisheries ministry. INIA — national agricultural research institute.
Asamblea General — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (99 members) and Cámara de Senadores (30 members). Contact through parlamento.gub.uy. Uruguay is one of Latin America's strongest democracies.

UZ.s: Central Asian economia ($115B PIB). Rendas do gás 11.04% PIB. Mining 8.5% (gold — Muruntau is world's largest open-pit gold mine, uranium). Agricultura a 18.3%. Manufatura a 20.2%. Post-Karimov liberalization (since 2016).

sectors.w: Uzbekistan's gas sector (Uzbekneftegaz) consumes most production domestically at heavily subsidized prices, encouraging waste. Quando por campo production and domestic consumption data is published, W se torna computável.
bp: Gas price reform eliminating subsidies that encourage wasteful consumption. Quando domestic gas prices reflect market value, o interesse sobreposto em underpriced energy enfraquece.
Per-field production, distribution, and consumption data. Uzbekistan has begun EITI implementation. Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Gas combustion emits CO₂. However, Uzbekistan's enormous solar potential (300+ sunny days/year) can displace gas in electricity generation.

i: State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection (Goskomekologiya) — ambiental regulator. EITI Uzbekistan — Uzbekistan became an EITI member in 2021.
Uzbekneftegaz — state gas company. NMMC (Navoi Mining and Metallurgical Company) — operates Muruntau gold mine (world's largest open-pit) and uranium mines. Almalyk MMC — copper and gold mineração.
Ministry of Energy — energy policy. Goskomekologiya — ambiental regulation. Uzbekistan has been implementing significant economic reforms since 2016.

Oliy Majlis — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (Qonunchilik palatasi, 150 members) and Senate, 100 members. Note: limited political pluralism. International channels: EITI, EBRD, ADB, SCO. Aral Sea ambiental disaster requires international cooperation.

VE.s: Oil-dependent economia in crisis ($119.8B PIB — severely contracted from peak). World's largest proven oil reserves. Economic data largely unavailable (World Bank reports zeros for most indicators). Hyperinflation, mass emigration. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Venezuela's oil industry has collapsed from ~3.3M bpd (1990s) to ~700K bpd due to mismanagement, underinvestment, and sanções. The interesse sobreposto is already weakened by operational failure.
bp: Production collapse has already weakened the interesse sobreposto — PDVSA lacks the capital and technical capacity to maintain production. Sanctions further constrain revenue.
Oil revenue transparência is impossible under current governance opacity. However, international sanções monitoring (OFAC designations) provides partial W computability.
Não é possível quebrar. Oil extraction and refining emit CO₂. Venezuela's heavy crude (Orinoco Belt) is particularly emissões-intensive to process.

Support post-transition EITI membership planning
i: Note: No independent domestic institutions exist. Transparencia Venezuela — anti-corruption NGO. PROVEA — Venezuelan human rights organization. Operating environment is extremely hostile to sociedade civil.
PDVSA (Petróleos de Venezuela, S.A.) — state oil company, severely degraded operationally. Chevron — received limited US OFAC license to operate. Repsol, ENI — maintain limited presence.

No independent domestic regulation exists. OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control, US Treasury) — administers Venezuela sanções. EU — maintains sanções. PDVSA is both regulator and operator — no separation exists.

Asamblea Nacional — 277 members. Note: Venezuela's institutions lack independence under current governance. International channels: OAS (Venezuela withdrawn/suspended), International Contact Group, ICC preliminary examination, Lima Group (reduced activity).

VN.s: Fast-growing economia ($476.4B PIB). Manufatura a 24.4% PIB. Agricultura a 11.9%. Rendas do carvão 0.38%. Oil 0.67%. Rendas florestais 1.07%. Major electronics and textile manufacturing hub. One-party state (Communist Party).

sectors.w: Viet Nam is rapidly expanding coal power capacity despite excellent renewable potential (solar, wind, offshore wind). JETP (Just Energy Transition Partnership) funding ($15.5B pledged) creates leverage to shift the interesse sobreposto away from coal.
bp: JETP implementation — $15.5B pledged by international partners for coal-to-renewables transition. Quando JETP funding makes renewables cheaper than new coal, o interesse sobreposto em coal expansion breaks.
Per-plant emissões and health cost data. Viet Nam's coal plants are concentrated in the north (Quảng Ninh) and south (Bình Thuận). Torna W computável.
Não é possível quebrar. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.

i: MONRE — environment and natural resources ministry. VUSTA — umbrella organization for Vietnamese sociedade civil (within party framework). Note: independent sociedade civil is not permitted in Viet Nam's one-party system.

EVN (Tập đoàn Điện lực Việt Nam) — state electricity utility. PVN (PetroVietnam) — state oil and gas company. TKV (Vinacomin — Tập đoàn Công nghiệp Than - Khoáng sản Việt Nam) — state coal mineração company.

MOIT — energy and industrial policy. PDP VIII (Power Desenvolverment Plan VIII, approved 2023) — sets energia renovável targets. JETP — Just Energy Transition Partnership ($15.5B pledged by IPG partners including US, EU, UK, Japan).

Quốc hội (National Assembly) — unicameral, 500 members. Viet Nam is a estado de partido único (Communist Party). JETP International Partners Group provides the primary leverage mechanism. International channels: ASEAN, World Bank, ADB, JETP IPG.

XK.s: Small Western Balkan economia ($11.2B PIB). Manufatura a 12.6%. Rendas do carvão 0.38%. Mining 0.55%. Agricultura a 7.3%. Youngest population in Europe. candidato à UE status pending. Two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A and B) supply ~95% of electricity.

sectors.w: Kosovo's near-total dependence on two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A — one of Europe's worst polluters — and Kosovo B) faces EU accession conditionality and enormous health costs.
bp: EU accession pathway requiring IED/LCPD compliance. Kosovo A is scheduled for decommissioning. Quando ambiental compliance costs are applied, new renewables are cheaper than coal retrofit.
Per-plant emissões and health cost data. Kosovo A and B cause severe air pollution in Pristina — among Europe's worst air quality. Torna W computável.
Não é possível quebrar. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.

i: AMMK — ambiental protection agency. INDEP (Institute for Desenvolverment Policy) — research and advocacy. GAP Institute — Kosovo public policy think tank.
KEK — Kosovo Energy Corporation, estatal, operates Kosovo A (5 units, 800 MW, built 1962-1975) and Kosovo B (2 units, 678 MW, built 1983-1984). KOSTT — transmission system operator.
ERO — regulador de energia. MMPH (Ministria e Mjedisit, Planifikimit Hapësinor dhe Infrastrukturës) — environment ministry. Kosovo is an Energy Community Treaty member.

Kuvendi i Kosovës (Assembly of Kosovo) — unicameral, 120 members. Contact through kuvendikosoves.org. Kosovo declared independence in 2008 (recognized by ~100 UN members). Energy Community Treaty member.

ZA.s: Largest sub-Saharan economia ($401.1B PIB). Rendas do carvão 2.44% PIB. Mining 3.83% (gold, platinum group metals, chrome, manganese). Manufatura a 12.8%. Serviços a 63%. Constitutional democracia. Severe electricity crisis (load shedding).

sectors.w: South Africa generates ~80% of electricity from coal (Eskom's aging fleet). JETP funding ($8.5B pledged) and Eskom's operational crisis (load shedding) create dual pressure. Quando coal plant health costs are internalized, the interesse sobreposto breaks.
bp: JETP implementation and Eskom restructuring. $8.5B pledged for coal-to-renewables transition. Quando renewable IPPs are cheaper and more reliable than aging coal plants, o interesse sobreposto em coal dependence breaks.

Per-plant emissões, health costs, and reliability data. Eskom's coal fleet is extensively documented — multiple plants fail to meet South Africa's own emission standards (granted repeated postponements). Torna W computável.
Não é possível quebrar. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂. South Africa's coal is high-ash content, exacerbating particulate emissões.

i: DFFE — the environment department. groundWork — South African ambiental justice organization. Centre for Environmental Rights — public interest ambiental law organization. Life After Coal campaign — coalition challenging Eskom's coal dependence.

Eskom — state electricity utility, operates 15 coal-fired power stations. Exxaro Resources — coal mineração. Thungela Resources — thermal coal (spun off from Anglo American). Seriti Resources — coal mineração. REIPPPP (Renewable Energy Independent Power Producer Procurement Programme) — auction program.

NERSA — regulador de energia. DMRE — mineral resources and energy department. IRP 2019 (Integrated Resource Plan) — South Africa's electricity plan. JETP Investment Plan — guides $8.5B transition funding.

Parliament of South Africa — bicameral: National Assembly (400 members) and National Council of Provinces (90 members). Contact through parliament.gov.za. South Africa is a constitutional democracia, G20 member, BRICS member. JETP International Partners Group: France, Germany, UK, US, EU.

ZM.s: Southern African economia ($25.3B PIB). Mining 28.25% PIB — one of the highest mineração dependencies globally (copper). Rendas florestais 6.78%. Serviços a 57.2%. Africa's second-largest copper producer. Democratic governance with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Zambia's copper mineração generates acid mine drainage and SO₂ from smelting (Mopani, KCM — historically among Africa's worst polluters). Quando por mina ambiental data is published, W se torna computável.
bp: Mining royalty reform with ambiental earmarking. Quando mineração revenue is partly allocated to ambiental remediation, o interesse sobreposto em externalizing pollution costs enfraquece.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring data through ZEITI and ZEMA. Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Copper smelting emissões can be reduced with modern sulfuric acid capture technology. Mopani smelter upgrade demonstrates this.

i: ZEMA — ambiental management agency. Copperbelt communities have suffered decades of SO₂ and heavy metal pollution — documented by multiple studies and legal cases (e.g., Vedanta/KCM litigation in UK courts).

First Quantum Minerals — operates Kansanshi (one of Africa's largest copper mines) and Sentinel mines. Barrick Gold — operates Lumwana copper mine. Mopani Copper Mines — majority owned by ZCCM-IH after Glencore divestment. KCM (Konkola Copper Mines) — under provisional liquidation.
Ministry of Mines and Minerals Desenvolverment. ZEITI (Zambia Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member. Mining Cadastre Department — licensing authority.

National Assembly of Zambia — unicameral, 156 elected members + 8 nominated. Contact through parliament.gov.zm. Zambia is a presidential republic with competitive elections (peaceful transitions in 1991, 2011, 2021). SADC (Southern African Desenvolverment Community) member.

ZW.s: Southern African economia ($41.5B PIB). Mining 4.24% PIB (platinum group metals, gold, lithium, diamonds). Agricultura a 8.7%. Manufatura a 15.6%. Rendas florestais 1.82%. Governance concerns. Major lithium reserves (Bikita, Arcadia).

sectors.w: Zimbabwe's mineração sector is expanding rapidly (lithium — critical for EV batteries — and PGMs). Quando por mina ambiental data is published alongside revenue, W se torna computável.
bp: International supply chain due diligence for critical minerals (lithium for EU Battery Regulation compliance). Quando EU buyers require ambiental verification, o interesse sobreposto em unregulated extraction enfraquece.
Per-mine ambiental monitoring through ZEITI (Zimbabwe applied for EITI candidacy). Torna W computável.
Parcialmente quebrável. Lithium mineração (hard-rock) generates waste rock and uses water. Best-practice processing and water recycling reduce dependência do sistema.

Pressionar por EITI membership to improve mineração transparência
i: EMA — ambiental management agency. ZELA — ambiental law organization. Note: sociedade civil space is constrained in Zimbabwe.

Zimplats — Zimbabwe's largest PGM producer (Impala Platinum subsidiary). Bikita Minerals — lithium mineração (Sinomine Resources acquired). Arcadia Lithium — major lithium deposit (Zhejiang Huayou Cobalt acquired). Caledonia Mining — gold.
Ministry of Mines and Mining Desenvolverment. EMA — ambiental regulation. ZMDC — state mineração company. Zimbabwe's Mines and Minerals Act governs the sector.

Parliament of Zimbabwe — bicameral: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members). Note: ZANU-PF dominance limits effective legislative oversight. International channels: SADC, AU, EITI (Zimbabwe has expressed interest in joining).

CN.s: World's second-largest economia ($18,743.8B PIB). Manufatura a 24.9% PIB — global factory floor. Rendas do carvão 0.61%. Indústria a 36.5%. Serviços a 56.7%. One-party state (CPC). World's largest CO₂ emitter. Rapid renewable deployment alongside continued coal expansion.

sectors.w: China operates ~1,100 GW of coal capacity — more than the rest of the world combined. However, China also deploys more energia renovável annually than any other country. Quando renewable deployment makes new coal uneconomic, o interesse sobreposto em coal expansion breaks.
bp: Renewable energy cost competitiveness — China's solar and wind are already cheaper than new coal in most provinces. Quando existing coal plants become more expensive to run than new renewables, the interesse sobreposto breaks. This is already happening in eastern provinces.
Per-plant emissões data. China's national ETS (launched 2021) covers ~4.5 billion tonnes CO₂. Expanding coverage from electricity to industry sectors makes W computable.
Não é possível quebrar. Coal combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury by chemistry.

i: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) — central autoridade ambiental. 12369 hotline — ambiental complaint system receiving millions of reports annually. Provincial Environmental Protection Bureaus — local enforcement. IPE (Institute of Public & Environmental Affairs, 公众环境研究中心) — Ma Jun's NGO providing corporate ambiental data.

China's 'Big Five' power generators: CHN Energy (国家能源集团), China Huaneng (华能), China Datang (大唐), China Huadian (华电), SPIC (国家电投). All estatal, collectively operating most coal capacity. Also rapidly scaling renewables.

NEA (National Energy Administration) — energy planning and regulation. NDRC (National Desenvolverment and Reformar Commission, 国家发展和改革委员会) — economic planning, sets electricity prices. National ETS — world's largest carbon market by coverage (power sector).

National People's Congress (全国人民代表大会) — ~3,000 members. China is a estado de partido único — the NPC does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: US-China climate bilateral, COP/UNFCCC, G20. China's dual carbon targets: peak CO₂ before 2030, carbon neutrality by 2060.

KR.s: Advanced economia ($1,875.4B PIB). Manufatura a 26.6% PIB (semiconductors, automobiles, shipbuilding, petrochemicals). Serviços a 57.5%. Heavy energy import dependence. Fourth-largest coal importer globally. G20 member. Vibrant democracia.

sectors.w: South Korea operates ~37 GW of coal capacity and is the world's 4th-largest coal importer. The 10th Basic Plan for Electricity Supply and Demand targets coal phase-down. Quando carbon pricing (K-ETS) makes coal uncompetitive versus LNG and renewables, the interesse sobreposto breaks.
bp: K-ETS (Korea Emissions Trading Scheme) carbon price escalation. Quando carbon costs make coal-fired generation more expensive than LNG and renewables, o interesse sobreposto em coal dependence breaks.
Per-plant emissões and health cost data. Korea Environment Institute and Korean medical associations have documented coal plant health impacts. Torna W computável.
Não é possível quebrar. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.

i: Ministry of Environment (환경부) — autoridade ambiental. KFEM (환경운동연합) — South Korea's largest ambiental NGO. Solutions for Our Climate (기후솔루션) — climate policy advocacy organization.
KEPCO — state electricity company (subsidiary gencos operate coal plants). POSCO — steelmaker, major coal consumer. Samsung, SK Group, Hyundai — major conglomerates with growing RE100 commitments.
MOTIE — energy and industry ministry. K-ETS — Korea Emissions Trading Scheme (launched 2015, covers ~70% of national emissões). KPX (한국전력거래소) — electricity market operator.

국회 (National Assembly) — unicameral, 300 members. Contact through assembly.go.kr. South Korea is a presidential republic with competitive elections. G20 member, OECD member, Powering Past Coal Alliance member (joined 2021).
